[ edit | edit source ]
 Crescent Devolution is automatically acquired upon obtaining a Crescent Vulpaphyla .

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • The larval form floats beside the owner, similar to a Sentinel .

• Devolution prevents bleedout and thus the Vulpaphyla cannot be revived normally. Its transformation also cannot be sped up.

• The larva will launch itself at enemies, then return to their owner's side after 5 seconds

• Has a cooldown of ~8 seconds starting after it returns to the owner's side. The larva has been observed to use this ability a maximum of 3 times.

• Guaranteed Impact status on the target. Sometimes applies Viral , exact conditions unknown. Source may an area around where the larval form hits the ground and explodes.

• Damage is affected by Maul , but not elemental mods.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • This mod can be acquired from Cephalon Simaris for 75,000 Standing 75,000 .

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Helios will randomly select a single enemy within 30 meters to mark with a weakspot for 10 seconds.
 • The mark has a 'fade-in' time of approximately 0.5 seconds and a duration of 9.5 seconds at max rank.

• The mark will remain for the full duration even if the target moves further than 30 meters away after being marked.

• Marked target will have a randomly selected body part highlighted in Helios's primary energy color, visible to all squad members. Attacks on the highlighted weakspot will deal 2.75x damage.
 • The highlighted area does not count as an actual weak point for the purposes of effects like Acuity Mods or charging Incarnon weapons.

• The damage increase stacks multiplicatively with body part multipliers .

• After the mark expires or the marked target dies, Helios will have a 2s cooldown before marking another target.

• Enemies must have a completed codex entry prior to entering the mission to be eligible to be marked with a weakspot.

• It is not necessary to have Investigator equipped for Detect Vulnerability to function, and marking an enemy with a weakspot does not consume a Codex Scanner charge.

• Although the precept functions similarly to Banshee's Sonar ability, the highlighted weakspot is smaller and will not trigger Resonance .

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 Dig is automatically acquired upon obtaining a Sahasa Kubrow .

sections.title: Drop Locations
sections.text: [ edit | edit source ]

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Has a cooldown of 14 seconds starting after the dig animation ends, effectively completing one Dig every ~20 seconds.

• At max rank, the listed 270% success chance means that the Kubrow will always dig up two sets of items, with a 70% chance of a third item set.
 • An item set always includes everything the player needs between a health orb, a small energy orb and ammunition.

• When in use, the Kubrow will bark twice to notify the player, stop at a location and paw along the ground for 5 seconds, before barking twice to alert players of its find.

• The mods that may occasionally be dug up are taken from the same mod list used by Void containers.
 • The threshold values for energy and health orb prioritization seem to be 80% (or lower) of total energy/health capacity.

• Ammo is retrieved upon not having full reserves.

• The type of resources dug up is determined at the very end of the digging animation.

• As of Update 37 , the sahasa kubrow can dig in the middle of combat as long as its health isn't critically low.

• Kubrow can dig even in places on tilesets where normally finding such items in the floor/ground should not be possible. (i.e. Corpus Ship , Grineer Galleon , Orokin Tower , etc.)

 Draining Bite is automatically acquired upon obtaining a Vasca Kavat .

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Has a cooldown of 20 seconds.

• The attack uses the stats of Vasca Claws and is affected by mods.
 • Damage can be increased with damage mods such as Maul .

• Critical chance can be increased with Bite and Hunter Synergy .

• Critical damage can be increased with Bite and Radon Claws .

• Additional status effects can be inflicted based on the claws' damage types and status chance, both affected by mods.
 • This includes converted elemental damage from Burning Claws , Chilling Claws , Sepsis Claws , and Shocking Claws .

• Vasca Claws deal Slash damage innately, which can cause the attack to inflict more Slash stacks than expected.

• Status duration for both the forced Slash status and other statuses can be increased with Magnetic Claws and Frenzied Posture .

• Unaffected by Swipe .

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 The mod can be bought from Son for 20,000 Standing 20,000 after reaching Rank 3 - Associate with the Entrati .

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Clones will attack enemies whether or not Assault Mode or Elusive Posture are equipped. However, Posture Mod bonuses (e.g. Puncture from Protector Posture ) still apply.

• Clones are counted as companions, and will benefit from companion bonuses such as Summoner's Wrath and Theorem Infection .

• Clones will not enter the Rift .

• Since clone creation requires Energy spent, this mod cannot be triggered by Hildryn or Lavos .

• The following counts towards the "energy spent" requirement:
 • Energy removed by the Energy Drain modifier in Nightmare missions.

• Energy drained by Quick Thinking and Gladiator Finesse .

• Energy removed by losing Arcane Battery buff.

• Hildryn picking up Energy Orbs .

• Operator casting abilities.

• Channeled and drain-on-use abilities like Wisp 's Sol Gate and Ivara 's Artemis Bow .

• Clones are completely invulnerable to any form of damage, and can only die after their listed lifespan has elapsed since they were created.
 • Despite being invincible, enemies will still have their aggro drawn to them and attempt to fight them.

• Cloned Sentinels will float toward enemies rather than sticking to the player, drawing some aggro away from the player as a result.

• Invisibility applied to the player is only shared with the main Companion, it is not applied to any summoned/spawned clones and they will remain visible to distract enemy fire.

• Since the clones can only use basic attacks, they benefit greatly from Beast Claws Mods . They can use all the claw mods and deal full damage with them.

• While clones cannot activate any abilities, they can still be useful for spreading status effects, especially if buffed by external sources (e.g. Nourish ).

• Clones will not benefit from, nor trigger, most mods on the Companion itself. Tested examples include but are not limited to: Momentous Bond , Astral Bond , Vicious Bond , Contagious Bond , Seismic Bond , Tandem Bond , Hunter Recovery , Synth Deconstruct , Fired Up , Hunter Recovery , and Energy Generator .
 • Hard Engage is an exception, as MOA (Companion) clones will gain the ability to use melee attacks.

• This mod cannot be equipped on Venari .

• Spectral colors of the clones' appearance are dependent on the sentinel's weapon colors.

sections.title: Notes

[ edit | edit source ]
 • The ability locks onto enemies within 10 meters and will track them until they die or are further than 15 meters away. After it loses a target there is a short cooldown time before it will activate this precept again.

• Enemies will be able to fire a few shots off or use an ability between stun animations.

• Can trigger Melee Influence .

• Only activates while the enemies are attacking you.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 Endoparasitic Vector is automatically acquired upon obtaining a Pharaoh Predasite .

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Shoots an endoparasite projectile that stops when it encounters an enemy or surface.
 • When it hits a creature or surface, and at the end of its duration, the endoparasite causes Blast damage in a 5 meter radius.

• If the projectile hits an enemy, it becomes attached to it for 5s.
 • The endoparasite causes Viral damage every second for 4 seconds in a 5 meter radius, each time applying a guaranteed Viral proc.

• Damage and status effects caused by both the explosion and the damage over time effect are affected by elemental mods, such as Venom Teeth .
 • Status chance applies independently on the explosion and on the damage over time effect, as well as independently on the main target and other enemies within a 5 meter radius.

• Explosion damage and the damage over time effect do not proc claws' innate Gas status effect.

• Explosion damage and the damage over time effect is not affected by Maul or Bite .

• Has a ~11 second cooldown.

• The color of the projectile is determined by the Pharaoh Predasite's Energy color in their appearance settings.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 Fatal Attraction is automatically acquired upon obtaining Djinn .

sections.title: Drop Locations
sections.text: [ edit | edit source ]

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • It does not pull the enemies close like Mag 's Pull , but rather causes them to harmlessly walk towards the sentinel, preventing them from using their weaponry.

• Has a 5 second attraction period. If there are not enough enemies within kill range once the period's up, the ability will not activate and it will proceed to cooldown.
 • During this attraction period, all enemies are drawn to the Sentinel.

• Guaranteed Corrosive proc upon activation. Deals damage and apply one proc every second for 5 seconds. The base damage is closer to 330 than 250 (as of Hotfix 29.9.1 (2021-02-24)), 20% of this damage is done every second.

• Has a 30 second cooldown.

• Gives the Sentinel no experience for activating this ability.

• Since Sentinel can gain ally buffs. Fatal Attraction damage can be further enhanced with Rhino 's Roar .

• The mod will not activate unless nearby enemies are alerted and player is not invisible. If the mod activates and the player change the conditions such as distance to enemies or their visibility, Fatal Attraction will be cancelled.

• Has synergies with the Gazal Machete ;
 • Anytime Djinn casts Fatal Attraction, the Gazal Machete gains additional +??% Corrosive damage for 30 seconds .

• Kills done by the Gazal Machete will empower Fatal Attraction, dealing additional Corrosive damage on the radial blast. Gazal kill counts does not seem to have a timer on them. Kill count either get spent when Fatal Attraction dealt damage or lost when Djinn dies.

• There is no way to display Fatal Attraction damage or Gazal kill count on screen (player can only assume its damage by checking enemy health).

• Max kill count seems to be 7 for a total damage of approximately 2800.

sections.title: Drop Locations
sections.text: [ edit | edit source ]

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • The +200% damage bonus is additive with other sources of base damage , but is multiplicative to both melee damage bonuses (such as Maul ) and faction damage bonuses (such as Roar and Summoner's Wrath )
 • Damage bonus stacks additively with itself if cast multiple times on the same enemy, giving an effective damage multiplier of 3x with 1 cast, 5x with 2 casts, 7x on 3 casts, etc.

• Cooldown of 10 seconds.

• Dead enemies may still glow for a short time or may begin to glow if the ability is cast as they die. This may cause confusion as the bright color incorrectly implies the enemy is alive even if they are not.

• The pulse ignores walls, but the highlight is not visible through them.

• Sentient Cores

• Eidolon Shards

• Profit-Taker Orb 's drops

• Exploiter Orb 's drops

• Will allow Venari to pick up Index points in The Index , sucking them up like normal items when dropped. It also allows the pickup of energy orbs from dispensers around Index maps.

• For Venari, Fetch will not have its effect stacked with either another Fetch or Vacuum on Khora 's second Companion.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 Ghost is automatically acquired upon obtaining Shade , Prisma Shade , or Shade Prime .

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • When an enemy is within 24m of the player, Shade will cloak both itself and its master with Invisibility .
 • Activation does not require line of sight from player or Shade.

• The activation range of Ghost is centered on Shade, not the player.

• Shade does a twirl when activating Ghost.

• Invisibility lasts indefinitely until one of the following happens:
 • The player attacks with a weapon.
 • Attacking with the Operator does not break Ghost.

• Codex Scanner and Synthesis Scanner are considered weapons.

• No enemies are within the detection range.
 • Ghost will remain active for 3 seconds when enemies are no longer within range. Moving near enemies again will sustain it.

• Shade uses a higher ranked Precept .
 • Vacuum , Odomedic , and Anti-Grav Array do not break Ghost.

• The player is inactive for 1 minute.

• Has a 7 second cooldown after leaving any kind of invisibility, including itself.
 • Activating other forms of invisibility while Ghost is active will not break the effect of Ghost after the other effect ends, provided there is still an enemy in proximity and no weapon/ability that would break the effect was used.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 Hard Engage is automatically acquired upon obtaining a MOA built with the Nychus Model .

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Melee attacks have 0% base critical chance, 2x critical damage, and 20% status chance.
 • Hard Engage is not affected by the MOA's equipped weapon stats, including any innate elements. Hard Engage is affected by most of the weapon's equipped mods.
 • The weapon's type (such as Shotgun, Rifle, or Pistol) will determine which mods are available.

• Multishot , Fire Rate , Reload , and Ammo mods have no effect.

• Shivering Contagion does not apply.

• Mods that increase Impact damage, such as Full Contact , will increase the damage dealt.

• At close range, the MOA will always prefer melee attacks over shooting the equipped weapon.

• Most melee attacks hit twice.

• Melee attacks trigger Seismic Bond and Vicious Bond , unlike Blast Shield .

• Clones spawned via Duplex Bond will also use melee attacks.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 Iatric Mycelium is automatically acquired upon obtaining a Vizier Predasite .

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Spore trails remain active for 5 seconds.

• The regeneration effect can be refreshed by walking into the spores again.

• Can heal both the Operator and allied Necramech that come in contact.

• Can heal Nekros ' Shadows of the Dead

• Spore trail follows the Predasite, and as such all spores may remain in one spot.

• Seems to cast every ~23 seconds, instead of the listed 8 seconds at max rank.

• Despite the fact other companion precepts can trigger Archon Mod effects like Archon Stretch , this precept cannot trigger Archon Intensify .

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 Investigator is automatically acquired upon obtaining Helios or Helios Prime .

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Requires a Codex Scanner or Synthesis Scanner equipped in the gear wheel for Helios to use scan charges from. If there are no charges, Helios will not scan anything.
 • Investigator will consume any available Codex Scanner charges first, then consume Synthesis Scanner charges if available.

• If one has the Sol-Battery Widget installed in an equipped Synthesis Scanner, Investigator's scans do not consume Scanner charges of either type.

• Investigator will not scan targets with complete codex entries.

• Helios' scans will not give the player Cephalon Simaris standing , even if Investigator consumed a Synthesis Scanner charge to do so. Scans only award affinity , like the use of a Codex Scanner.

• When Helios begins scanning a target, it will be highlighted in orange, as if the player were currently aiming with a Scanner. To achieve a successful scan, avoid killing such highlighted enemies until Helios' scan is complete.

sections.title: Drop Locations
sections.text: [ edit | edit source ]

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Link Fiber can be equipped on Kubrows , Kavats , MOAs , and Hounds , but not on Sentinels .

• Link Fiber cannot be equipped simultaneously with Metal Fiber .

• Link Fiber uses the player's maximum Armor as the base, which means using Mods like Umbral Fiber ​ (with full set bonus), Armored Agility ​, Gladiator Aegis ​, Saxum Carapace , Jugulus Carapace , Carnis Carapace , Stand United (with Coaction Drift ) and Arcanes like Arcane Ultimatum , Arcane Guardian and Arcane Tanker can further increase a companion's maximum armor.
 • With Link Fiber on any Beast companion, a maximum armor value of 4,694.26 (a 93.99% damage reduction) can be achieved using the above armor mods with Valkyr Prime .

• A companion can attain an even higher maximum armor value of over 5000 if the player chooses to use Chroma with a high power strength and the usage of Vex Armor . Exact numbers depend on accurate power strength, armor raising mods and Arcanes. With exactly 5000 armor, this would be a 94.34% damage reduction.

sections.title: Drop Locations
sections.text: [ edit | edit source ]

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Link Redirection can be equipped on Kubrows , Kavats , MOAs , and Hounds , but not on Sentinels .

• Link Redirection cannot be equipped simultaneously with Calculated Redirection .

• Redirection , Primed Vigor , and Augur Accord can help drastically improve a Beast's maximum shields, as this mod uses the player's maximum shields as the base.
 • With Link Redirection on a Huras Kubrow , a maximum shield value of 6,265.5 can be achieved using the above shield mods with a Hildryn .

• Link Redirection will allow most direct forms of shield recovery to apply to the pet, including Harrow 's Condemn , Hildryn 's Pillage , the Rakta Dark Dagger 's passive, Volt 's Capacitance , and Protea 's Grenade Fan .
 • Link Redirection does not create overshields.

• Link Redirection does not share passive shield regeneration effects such as Arcane Aegis .

• Link Redirection does not apply shield generation or overshields from the Augur Set or Brief Respite .

• With a fully ranked copy of Link Redirection, the Warframe's minimal required shield value to activate Reinforced Bond 's fire rate bonus depends on the base shield value of the equipped companion:
 • Adarza Kavat and Smeeta Kavat have the lowest base shield value of 230. The equipped Warframe needs at least 776 shields.

• A Hound with Adlet and Cela has the highest base shield value of 585. The equipped Warframe needs at least 492 shields.

• Khora needs at least 960 shields, as Venari does not have any base shields, but can still equip Link Redirection to gain shields.

 • Link Vitality can be equipped on Kubrows , Kavats , MOAs , and Hounds , but not on Sentinels .

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • This mod can be acquired from Cephalon Simaris for 75,000 Standing 75,000 .

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Has a cooldown of 1 second.

• Looter does not require a sentinel weapon or the Striker precept equipped.

• Looter will trigger for Resource Deposits .

• Use Looter alongside Vacuum to ensure the pickups be gathered once the containers are destroyed.

• Looter will not attempt to trigger for Rare or Reinforced Storage Containers, possibly due to the container requiring more damage to open, or to prevent the contents from being overlooked.

• Looter effects are silent and will not alert nearby enemies.

• Looter will not detonate nearby Explosive Barrels or LN2 barrels, even if caught in the blast wave.

• The wave of energy will break containers through walls. However, Carrier still needs a line of sight to a container to trigger Looter.

• Looter will not trigger if the companion is busy doing something else such as shooting (with the Assault Mode precept) or boosting shields (with Shield Charger )

sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Players who owned a Smeeta Kavat prior to Update 37.0 (2024-10-02) will receive Loyal Retriever for free on login.

• Loyal Retriever can be purchased from Master Teasonai in Cetus for:
 • 1 Plains Kuaka Tag

• 1 Common Condroc Tag

• 1 Ostia Vasca Kavat Tag

• 1 Coastal Mergoo Tag

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Doubles Void Trace pick-ups.

• Continues to function even while companion is downed.

• Khora 's Venari can not equip Loyal Retriever.

• Cannot be equipped alongside Prosperous Retriever or Resourceful Retriever .

• Has the potential to individually affect each ore type in a vein when hitting the special narrow brackets. This will be indicated with the "2x" icon near the name of the affected ore after mining the vein. The same applies to fishing and capturing wildlife, potentially giving you 2x fish or 2x/4x/6x tags on bad/good/perfect wildlife captures. Also may yield double the plants from harvesting.

• Effect doubles Cryotic excavator earnings.

• Certain resources, such as Orokin Cell , Riven Sliver , Kuva , etc., which appear on the bottom left of the screen when picked up, do not show a "2x" icon but are still doubled.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 The mod can be bought from Master Teasonai for 20,000 Standing 20,000 after reaching Rank 3 - Trusted with the Ostrons .

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Companion Ability cooldown reduction can be triggered by the player or companion killing enemies affected by 3 or more unique Status Effects.

• When a Companion uses a Precept that hits an enemy, all Damage Types , modded or innate, are inflicted as Status Effects on the enemy at one stack.
 • For example, a MOA is equipped with Shockwave Actuators and a Deth Machine Rifle modded for Gas and Cold . When it uses Shockwave Actuators, all enemies hit by the shockwave are inflicted with one stack of Gas , Cold , Impact , Puncture , and Slash .

• Only whether an element is on the weapon is taken into account, not weighting or status duration. Mods such as Lasting Sting have no effect.

• Elements generated via Momentous Bond will also apply to Companion Precepts.

• Requires Precepts to deal damage or apply status in order to trigger the companion weapon's status effects - this excludes Precepts that affect enemies in other ways, such as Cordon , while Precepts with delayed damage such as Fatal Attraction or Anti-Grav Grenade will likewise only trigger status application on the damage instance.
 • Not all damaging Precepts mention dealing any damaging hits in their descriptions; these include Whiplash Mine , Shockwave Actuators , and Repo Audit .

• Precepts that apply innate status without dealing damage include Coolant Leak and Electro Pulse .

• Applied status effects that can deal damage are not affected by mods or the base damage of the companion weapon. They will deal 1 damage per damage tick.
 • Due to the Heat Inherit mechanic, when utilizing Heat based weaponry, it is not recommended to mod Heat on your companion weapon as to avoid lowering your Heat DoT output if your companion precepts inflict Heat before you.
 • This may be beneficial when using Contagious Bond because if the first heat proc is from a companion all subsequent heat procs will be counted as damage from that companion.

• However, despite only adding Heat damage of weapon hits, the increased Heat from Fired Up can be Heat Inherited from applied procs from abilities.

• Faction Damage Mods are still applied once if applied on a target with a heat proc from Manifold Bond

• Works with every hit of Eximus auras copied by Null Audit .

• The cooldown reduction of companion abilities does not include:
 • The cooldown on cloaking on Ghost from Shade .

• Manifold Bond will trigger on Wisp Reservoirs Shock Mote.

sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 The mod can be bought from Son for 10,000 Standing 10,000 after reaching Friend with the Entrati .

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • When this mod is equipped, magenta tethers will briefly link the Vulpaphyla and any nearby corpses as health is stored. When the player's health falls below the threshold, they gain 1 second of invulnerability while the stored health is transferred to them.
 • This invulnerability phase does not purge negative status effects on the Warframe.

• In the event the player gains increased maximum health, such as a Heat -based Elemental Ward or Health Reservoirs , the Vulpaphyla will harvest more health accordingly. The extra health stored will persist even after the buffs have expired.

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • This ability has a 60 second cooldown

• The total healing is based on your Warframe's maximum health, including mods. For example, with 300 maximum health, you will regenerate 36 health. With 600 health using Vitality , you will regenerate 72 health.

• Since the full heal takes four seconds to complete, this mod regenerates 1/4 of the listed percentage per second.

• As the health restored is percentage-based, this mod will have a more noticeable effect on Warframes with higher health pools such as Inaros .

• At least 2 copies of the mod are needed in order to trade one of them.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 Mischief is automatically acquired upon obtaining a Smeeta Kavat .

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • The Smeeta Kavat can attack while cloaked and remain cloaked, allowing them to execute several attacks while invisible.

• Decoy possesses 50% of the Smeeta's Health , with 100% Critical Chance and 2.0x Critical Multiplier .

• As long as the decoy is active, the Smeeta Kavat is invisible and invulnerable. If the decoy dies, both effects will end.

• Blind has a radius of 8 meters.

• The decoy can be targeted by a Limbo 's Banish , which can allow it to draw much more fire from enemies for it's duration. Note that no matter what plane the Smeeta Kavat is in, the decoy will always spawn in the material plane.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 Molecular Conversion is automatically acquired upon obtaining Taxon .

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • The amount of Shields created is calculated after taking into account damage modifiers .

• Molecular Conversion will create Overshields for the Warframe if its shield restoration exceeds the amount of shields that the Warframe has lost.
 • The overshields stack as long as the player doesn't take damage to their overshields in excess to the shields granted.

• This stacking has an upper limit — 6 times the listed capacity. This is 1,200 overshields at max rank.

• Has a cooldown of 20 seconds.

• The beam can inflict Radiation 's Status Effect .

• Activates from Stealth , but only if target is already alerted.

• Does not work on Inaros , Nidus , or Kullervo , as they do not have shields.

• Enemies killed by the beam are disintegrated.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 The mod can be bought from The Business for 20,000 Standing 20,000 after reaching Rank 3 - Doer with Solaris United .

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Elemental bonus can be triggered by the player or companion killing Eximus enemies.

• Bonus damage that can be triggered includes the 4 base elementals and 6 combined elemental types.

• The elements from the buff do not combine with existing elements on the companion's weapon.

• The buff can be stacked multiple times, and it is possible to have all elemental buffs active at the same time. Each buff has its own timer that will be hidden by new triggers.

• Bonus only applies on companion's normal attack. Does not work with special abilities like Viral Quills , nor the clones from Duplex Bond .
 • However, it does apply to the shadow Kavats from Territorial Aggression .

• Elements gained by this mod count for Manifold Bond , since they are applied to the weapon.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • This mod can be acquired from Cephalon Simaris for 75,000 Standing 75,000 .

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Negate makes the user's Warframe status immune until any instance where they would have normally taken a status effect, then the cooldown begins where they are no longer immune.
 • Applies to non-element statuses as well, including Knockdown and Stun .

• Multiple status effects occurring simultaneously are nullified. (For example, both the Knockdown and Heat proc from an Arson Eximus attack.)

• Existing status effects are not removed when the cooldown expires.

• Cooldown can be reduced through Manifold Bond .

• Effect is always active regardless of mod order.
 • Should be placed in the bottom-right slot as it can prevent precepts later in priority from activating.

• Negate does not work while the Wyrm/Prime is inactive, for example on Titania 's Razorwing ability when active.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 Null Audit is automatically acquired upon obtaining a Hound built with the Bhaira Model .

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Cannot be equipped with Repo Audit and Equilibrium Audit .

• Cooldown is 60 seconds from the start of the previous use at all ranks.

• The Hound will locate the nearest Eximus enemy and attack it, generating a transparent bubble effect around the attacked unit, copying their unique abilities to the Hound and stripping Overguard. The Hound can only have one aura at a time. Eximus Behaviors are as follows:
 • Arson/Caustic Eximus gives the Hound the ability to use a fire blast to knock back enemies.

• Arctic/Frozen Eximus gives the Hound a radius that slightly slows down enemies while periodically generating a Snow Globe for its own protection. The globe blocks enemy fire, while Tenno gunfire can pass through unhindered.

• Shock/Bio-Electric Eximus will allow the Hound to fire off three shock orbs every 10 seconds that seek and rotate around enemies. The damage is non-existent on the Hound, compared to an enemy using this ability.

• Venomous Eximus gives the Hound Toxin procs on attacks and a 3m toxin cloud surrounding it. The damage is negligible.

• Guardian Eximus gives the Hound and Tenno a Damage Reduction buff, but will not inherit the rotating shields.

• Blitz Eximus gives the Hound the ability to use the shockwave every 10 seconds.

• Sanguine/Leech Eximus gives the Hound life steal on all attacks. Additionally, the Hound will generate the same sapping zones that the Eximus units can, which appear to do scaling damage.

• Energy Leech/Parasitic Eximus gives the Hound Magnetic procs on attacks, providing 3 energy per second over 3 seconds to Tenno within 25 meters. The Hound will also generate the same sapping fields associated with this Eximus, inflicting 2 Magnetic procs on any enemies in the area and restoring energy to nearby players.

• Jade Light Eximus will target nearby enemies with homing satellite lasers, dealing increasing Heat damage the longer the targeted enemy stays under it.

• Almost all abilities will inherit the Hound's chosen energy colors, allowing players to distinguish allied Eximus abilities. The Jade Light is a partial exception: while the beam's source will inherit the Hound's energy color, the beam will largely remain green.

sections.title: Drop Locations
sections.text: [ edit | edit source ]

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Although the description implies that it heals 40 health over 4 seconds, it instead heals 40 health per second for 4 seconds, totaling for 160 health.
 • A second/third stack is gained after traversing the distance listed on the mod once again.

• After gaining 3 stacks, any more distance will only reset the timer for the healing.

• Every stack gained resets the timer and adds one stack to the counter.

• Loses one stack at a time, refreshing the timer of remaining stacks.

• The user also does not need to maintain constant contact with a wall to meet the healing requirements, simply performing a single wall-jump and remaining airborne long enough to cover 3m will provide one stack from the mod.
 • The total distance covered must be horizontal.

• Aim-gliding will interrupt the total distance covered, preventing stacks from being gained.

• During the Bullet Jump animation, the horizontal distance will not be counted after a wall hop. The distance before and after the animation, however, will be counted.

• A good strategy to stack the mod quickly and efficiently is to hop away from the wall, double jump, and perform a roll. This will usually give 2-3 stacks.

sections.title: Drop Locations
sections.text: [ edit | edit source ]

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Cannot be equipped on Sentinels .

• Does not generate Shields or Overshields .

• Will heal Companions on all melee attacks, including Finishers , Stealth Attacks , and staggers via melee blocking . Thus, Warframes who can easily leave enemies open to finishers can make excellent use of this mod.

• Heals when hitting an enemy with bullet jump.

• Notably, each individual hit of Parazon finisher attacks can trigger the effects of this mod. for example, a 'backstab' finisher on a grineer lancer triggers the effect twice, while a finisher on an ancient healer triggers it four times.

• The mod's effects will also work with Exalted Weapons .
 • Khora 's Whipclaw can trigger this mod's effect.

• Atlas 's Landslide can trigger this mod's effect.

• The mod's effects will also work on the following abilities:
 • Voruna 's Ulfrun's Descent can trigger this mod's effect.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 Panzer Devolution is automatically acquired upon obtaining a Panzer Vulpaphyla .

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • The larval form floats beside the owner, similar to a Sentinel .

• Devolution prevents bleedout and thus the Vulpaphyla cannot be revived normally. Its transformation also cannot be sped up.

• Damage is affected by Maul , Bite , and elemental mods.

• Causes spores from Viral Quills to de-spawn on death.

• The larva spits up to 3 quills at nearby enemies every 5 seconds. Enemies that are hit are afflicted by spores, similar to Saryn 's Spores , which inflict Viral damage every second and applying Viral procs.
 • These quills don't trigger the lifesteal-link from Hunter Recovery or modded status effects like the full-grown Viral Quills do.

• Spores remain active until the Vulpaphyla respawns to its true form.

• Spores can be spread by shooting them.
 • Saryn 's Toxic Lash will also burst all spores on a target.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 Protect is automatically acquired upon obtaining a Raksa Kubrow .

sections.title: Drop Locations
sections.text: [ edit | edit source ]

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Protect recovers shields, similar to Guardian .
 • Unlike its Sentinel counterpart, Protect can be activated as long as the shield capacity of the Kubrow's master is not full, as well as replenish the Kubrow's shields.

• The following patterns have been observed with max rank Protect after forcing over 70 casts:
 • Shields replenished from Protect roll over into Overshields .

• Cooldown is inconsistent; Kubrow can use Protect twice over 1~2s before entering a 5s cooldown. If used extensively (after ~15 cooldowns in immediate succession), Protect enters a downtime of ~10s before it can activate again.

• Kubrow will perform a howling animation on activation, making it temporarily vulnerable against oncoming attacks.
 • The first shield replenish will occur at the start of the animation and the second near the end.

• Protect replenishes shields every 6 seconds
 • It will initially restore 15% of Kubrow's shields, followed by the other 15% shields after 1.5 seconds. After shield replenishment, it will take 4.5 seconds until Protect can restore shields again.

 Reflex Denial is automatically acquired upon obtaining a Hound built with the Cela Bracket .

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Cooldown of 10s.

• The shield has a 4m radius.
 • Allied damage is ignored, and will pass through the shield.

• Less effective against melee Infested units, as they seem to prioritize attacking the player rather than the Hound.

• Cannot be equipped with Diversified Denial and Evasive Denial .

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 The mod can be bought from The Business for 20,000 Standing 20,000 after reaching Rank 3 - Doer with Solaris United .

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • As noted above, the buff activates if the companion possesses over 1200 maximum shields through modding, and will remain active regardless of their actual moment-to-moment shield strength. However, the buff will temporarily deactivate if the companion is incapacitated.

• Alternatively, as reloading restores up to 150 shields, maintaining companion’s shields (including Overshield) over 1200 will activate the buff. Note that Battery Weapons won’t restore shields.

• In order to get at least 1200 maximum shields with the Calculated Redirection mod at maximum rank, your companion will need a minimum 343 base shield. This can only be accomplished by the following companions:
 • Wyrm Prime

• Nautilus Prime

• Huras Kubrow

• Raksa Kubrow

• Sunika Kubrow

• Any breed of Vulpaphyla or Predasite

• Any MOA or Hound with the right modular components. See Final MOA Stats and Final Hound Stats .

• Using a max-rank Link Redirection to reach the required 1200 maximum shields on beast companions is heavily dependent on your selected Warframe's maximum shields. Because different beasts have differing shield values, this can range from needing at least 568 maximum shields on your Warframe for Huras Kubrow to needing at least 776 maximum shields on your Warframe for Adarza Kavat and Smeeta Kavat .
 • For Khora specifically, she will need at least 960 maximum shields on herself to reach at least 1200 shields on Venari , who has 0 base shields.

• Weapons that reload per shell, such as the Strun , will generate Overshields for each shell loaded in.

• Bows and Battery Weapons cannot generate overshield.

• As long as a Vulpaphyla 's beast form reaches the 1200 shield threshold, the fire rate buff stays activated in their larval forms, even though the larvae don't have enough shields.

• Unlike most fire rate mods, the buff does not count double for Bows

• Switching to the incarnon mode of a firearm counts as reloading. Switching back to the regular mode Does not.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Resourceful Retriever can be purchased from Son in the Necralisk for:
 • 1 Sly Vulpaphyla Tag

• 1 Purple Velocipod Tag

• 1 Burrowing Cryptilex Tag

• 1 Common Avichaea Tag

• 1 Amethyst Nexifera Tag

• 1 Vizier Predasite Tag

• 1 Umber Undazoa Tag

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Doubles Void Trace pick-ups.

• Continues to function even while companion is downed.

• Khora 's Venari can not equip Resourceful Retriever.

• Cannot be equipped alongside Loyal Retriever or Prosperous Retriever .

• Has the potential to individually affect each ore type in a vein when hitting the special narrow brackets. This will be indicated with the "2x" icon near the name of the affected ore after mining the vein. The same applies to fishing and capturing wildlife, potentially giving you 2x fish or 2x/4x/6x tags on bad/good/perfect wildlife captures. Also may yield double the plants from harvesting.

• Effect doubles Cryotic excavator earnings.

• Certain resources, such as Orokin Cell , Riven Sliver , Kuva , etc., which appear on the bottom left of the screen when picked up, do not show a "2x" icon but are still doubled.

sections.title: Notes

However, it does not stack with other loot corpse abilities ( Nekros's Desecrate and Chesa Kubrow's Retrieve ).

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 Revenge is automatically acquired upon obtaining Shade , Prisma Shade , or Shade Prime .

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Upgrading increases the range this skill can be activated from (i.e. Shade will be able to retaliate against enemies that attack from a longer range).

• Without this mod equipped, the Shade will not attack.

• Revenge will only trigger if the Sentinel's master receives actual damage (invulnerability such as Iron Skin does not count). This does not also include the Sentinel itself taking damage.

• Used to display Wyrm in the picture until update 10.5.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • During Operation: Plague Star : obtained from Nakak in Cetus by trading 1,500 Standing 1,500 Operational Supply standing and 3,500 Credits 3,500 .

• During Operation: Ambulas Reborn : obtained from Ergo Glast by trading 75 Animo Beacons .

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Sacrifice triggers immediately after the master being downed during solo play, or when the Bleedout timer reaches zero when playing in a squad.
 • To trigger, Sacrifice must be equipped in a higher-priority (more upper left) slot than Assault Mode , otherwise with any enemies nearby Sentinel will continue attacking them, causing Sacrifice to be suppressed and the master dying without an attempt to be revived.

• More generally, due to the nature of Precept mods, it is best to place Sacrifice in the very upper left slot, so the sentinel will not prioritize using other skills such as Crowd Dispersion or Ghost over reviving the player. For example, if a Shade has been modded to prioritize Ghost first, it cannot use Sacrifice to revive its owner until Ghost ends. Further, if Ghost comes off cooldown while Shade is reviving the player, the revive will be interrupted by Ghost activating.

• Sacrifice does not work during Arbitrations .

• Sacrifice does not trigger Sanctuary or Mending Soul .

• Sacrifice will immediately trigger when activating Last Gasp .

• As enemies lose aggro to players in bleedout, the Sentinel is very prone to getting incapacitated while trying to revive the master [ citation needed ] .

• Sacrifice cannot be traded unless the player offering the item owns more than one copy (much like other Sentinel Precept mods).

 • Sacrifice triggers immediately after the master being downed during solo play, or when the Bleedout timer reaches zero when playing in a squad.
 • To trigger, Sacrifice must be equipped in a higher-priority (more upper left) slot than Assault Mode , otherwise with any enemies nearby Sentinel will continue attacking them, causing Sacrifice to be suppressed and the master dying without an attempt to be revived.

• More generally, due to the nature of Precept mods, it is best to place Sacrifice in the very upper left slot, so the sentinel will not prioritize using other skills such as Crowd Dispersion or Ghost over reviving the player. For example, if a Shade has been modded to prioritize Ghost first, it cannot use Sacrifice to revive its owner until Ghost ends. Further, if Ghost comes off cooldown while Shade is reviving the player, the revive will be interrupted by Ghost activating.

• Sacrifice does not work during Arbitrations .

• Sacrifice does not trigger Sanctuary or Mending Soul .

• Sacrifice will immediately trigger when activating Last Gasp .

• As enemies lose aggro to players in bleedout, the Sentinel is very prone to getting incapacitated while trying to revive the master [ citation needed ] .

• Sacrifice cannot be traded unless the player offering the item owns more than one copy (much like other Sentinel Precept mods).

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 The mod can be bought from Son for 20,000 Standing 20,000 after reaching Rank 3 - Associate with the Entrati .

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • A channeled ability must be active for both the shockwave to trigger and to gain stacks of the Ability Efficiency bonus.
 • Stacks are gained on any damage dealt by your companion. Each stack has its own duration.

• "Channeled abilities" that trigger Seismic Bond are the same abilities that triggers Arcane Intention . See list below.

• Shockwave deals Impact Damage and has a 0% Status Chance .
 • Damage scales with increases to melee damage (e.g. Precision Conditioning ), but is unaffected by damage conversion and elemental damage bonuses.

• Shockwave does not hit enemies protected with Overguard .

• Status Chance can be added to with Mecha Overdrive to create Impact procs.

• Shockwave can applies Status Effects via Manifold Bond .

• Shockwave does not trigger Vicious Bond .

• Ability Efficiency bonus is additive to similar bonuses such as Streamline .
 • A channeled ability does not have to be active to gain the Ability Efficiency bonus of existing stacks.

• Testing with Hildryn 's Balefire has shown that it snapshots Ability Efficiency on cast.

• Testing with Mesa 's Peacemaker has shown that it updates its energy consumption according to Ability Efficiency dynamically.

sections.title: Drop Locations

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Damage multiplier is multiplicative to all other damage increases.

• Cooldown of 4 seconds.

• When combined with Swipe only a single enemy will take bonus damage and lose its armor. Other enemies beyond the first will take damage as though from a normal attack, and will not take the extra damage, nor lose armor.

• Armor Reduction stacks additively with Corrosive Projection but only applies 1 time per target. Therefore, with 1 max rank Corrosive Projection active, a Kavat with a rank 2 Sharpened Claws will already remove enemy armor entirely. With a rank 1 Sharpened Claws 22% enemy armor will remain.

• Currently can also be equipped on Vulpaphyla pets, but not Predasites .

• Cannot armor strip Kuva Liches .

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Shield bonus is additive with bonuses such as Redirection .

• Shield Recharge Rate bonus is additive with bonuses such as Fast Deflection .

• Unlike Arcane Aegis , Shield Recharge Rate can be interrupted by damage, but with a greatly reduced Shield Recharge Delay.

• Once the ability duration ends, shields will go back to normal, leaving excess shields as overshields .

• Has a cooldown of 30 seconds.

• Will not grant shields if the user does not possess base shields of their own.

• Unlike Shield Osprey , it does not instantly recharge shields.

• Sentinels , Companions , Rescue Targets , Syndicate Operatives Syndicate Specters or Factional Allies cannot benefit from this mod.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 Shockwave Actuators is automatically acquired upon obtaining a MOA built with the Lambeo Model .

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Will only activate if the player is attacking enemies with a weapon and an enemy is nearby.
 • Will not activate unless the enemy is fully alert.

• Shockwave expands slowly for 3 seconds, up to a 12-meter radius.

• Enemies affected by the shockwave are also pushed back, in addition to being knocked down.

• Airborne enemies such as Scrambus and Attack Drone are unaffected.

• MOA must have line of sight for an enemy to be knocked down.
 • An enemy that is visually in the shockwave radius may not be affected due to this.

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • The larval form floats beside the owner, similar to a Sentinel .

• Devolution prevents bleedout and thus the Vulpaphyla cannot be revived normally. Its transformation also cannot be sped up.

• Duration is not increased by Tek Enhance .

• Additional kills will refresh the buff duration.

sections.title: Drop Locations
sections.text: [ edit | edit source ]

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • This mod follows the precept mod priority order rule, Precept mods will have different priorities in which they are used, based on which slot they equipped in; the top left mod slot has the highest priority and will be used most often, while the bottom right mod slot has the lowest priority and will be used least often. In other words, if you want this mod to work more frequently, it has to be among the first few slots.

•

 •

•

• Manifold Bond can reduce the 15 second cooldown of this mod ensuring more frequent activations.

• Enemies that are marked for this bonus resource drop chance pulse with a yellow energy effect.

• Increases the drop chance of resources from normal enemy drop tables. Resources with a 100% drop chance such as a Rare Resource from a boss drop or unique resources like Steel Essence will not be increased since they already have a guaranteed drop chance to begin with.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 Stalk is automatically acquired upon obtaining a Huras Kubrow .

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • When an enemy is within 24m of the Huras Kubrow, it will cloak both itself and its master with Invisibility .
 • Activation does not require line of sight from player or Huras Kubrow.

• The activation range of Stalk is centered on the Huras Kubrow, not the player.

• The Kubrow will make a howl animation when activating Stalk.

• Stalk lasts indefinitely until one of the following happens:
 • The player attacks with a weapon.
 • Attacking with the Operator does not break the cloak.

• Codex Scanner and Synthesis Scanner are considered weapons.

• No enemies are within the detection range.
 • Stalk will remain active for 3 seconds when enemies are no longer within range. Moving near enemies again will sustain it.

• The player is inactive for 1 minute.

• Has a 7 second cooldown after leaving any kind of invisibility, including itself.
 • Activating other forms of invisibility while Stalk is active will not break the effect of Stalk after the other effect ends, provided there is still an enemy in proximity and no weapon/ability that would break the effect was used.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 Stasis Field is automatically acquired upon obtaining a MOA built with the Lambeo Model .

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Seems to activate if an enemy is either in minor or full alert and/or targeting the player, MOA, or allies.

• Hitscan weapons are not slowed in any way, but will have their damage reduced.

• Cooldown of 45 seconds.
 • Cooldown starts as soon as the field is activated, resulting in an effective cooldown of 15s at max rank.

• Though this ability cannot inflict Status Effects with Manifold Bond , it is possible to reduce the cooldown of this ability with other sources of Status Effects. This can be done while the ability is still active, which will cause it to reactivate shortly after disappearing.

• Field has a 10m radius.

• Projectiles that exit the field will regain their damage and speed.

• Will slow down projectiles from Mind Controlled enemies.

• Constant strafing to the side while inside the radius is recommended, in order to dodge the now slow projectiles entirely.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 Synergized Prospectus is automatically acquired upon obtaining a Hound built with the Hinta Stabilizer .

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Cooldown of 10s.

• If no other enemy is in the ricochet range, the spark will return to the singular enemy.

• The spark has an aura around itself that continuously deals 300 electric damage every 0.5 seconds.
 • Each damage instance has a chance for an Electricity proc.

• Manifold Bond will activate on each damage tick.

• The sparks lifetime is entirely dependent on the amount of bounces. It can bounce 7 times and will explode on the 8th bounce.

• With Manifold Bond and equipped with the right status mods it can activate Cascadia Flare , Arcane Hot Shot and Arcane Universal Fallout .

• The explosion at the end of the sparks lifespan and status effects originating from that can activate Secondary Fortifier .

• Cannot be equipped with Focused Prospectus or Aerial Prospectus .

• Synergizes well with Synth Deconstruct , Manifold Bond and Archon Stretch .

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 The mod can be bought from Master Teasonai for 20,000 Standing 20,000 after reaching Rank 3 - Trusted with the Ostrons .

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Companion melee attacks reset the combo timer .

• Works with the extra targets from Swipe , as well as the shadow Kavats from Territorial Aggression .

• If a player has a riven with -chance to gain combo, the player can gain combo count with this mod, regardless, even in cases where the negative chance is past 100.

• Each spore that is popped from Viral Quills counts as 1 melee hit, meaning one enemy with the maximum of 10 spores will result in 66 combo gained.
 • The Vulpaphyla's melee attacking efficiency is hampered due Viral Quills' low cooldown, causing it to spend considerable time casting and reacquiring targets.

• Swipe helps the Vulpaphyla to hit all spores more consistently, as well as those on nearby enemies.

• Damage bonus is multiplicative to base damage mods like Maul , Precision Conditioning .
 • Damage bonus can be refreshed.

• The heavy attack needs to actually connect/hit a enemy to trigger the buff.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 Targeting Receptor is automatically acquired upon obtaining Helios or Helios Prime .

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • This mod cannot be equipped at the same time with Assault Mode .

• With Deconstructor :
 • Additional targets will consume additional ammo, requiring to reload more frequently.

• Helios will prioritize the least isolated enemy with each glaive - aiming to maximize the number of bounces.

• There is no benefit to upgrading Targeting Receptor from rank 2 to rank 3, as this will only increase the drain cost and does not improve the mod's effect.

• If the initial target is killed, Helios will proceed to reload even if there are many other enemies around and there are more Glaives left in the "magazine".

• If not using Deconstructor , there is no benefit to ranking up this mod at all - but it is an option if you specifically want Helios to only attack at 10m range.

• ( Primed ) Reach can be installed to increase the range of its attack to (13) 11.5 meters.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 The mod can be bought from The Business for 20,000 Standing 20,000 after reaching Rank 3 - Doer with Solaris United .

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Despite the mod's description reading "over 50%", the buff will still be applied when the companion's crit chance is at 50% . In other words, the companion's crit chance needs to be ≥ 50%.

• Does not affect Amp damage.

• Critical damage multiplier is a flat final and follows the formula 1 + (tier * (crit multi - 1 + final)) where the first tier is yellow (eg. skana multi is 1.5x which is brought to 2.7x (2.7x on yellow, 4.4x on orange, 6.1x on red and so on) the impact lessens depending on modded critical multiplier)

• The Robotic Weapons that can satisfy the critical chance requirements without Riven Mods are:
 • Prime Laser Rifle , Vulcax and Vulklok with Point Strike , Laser Rifle with Critical Delay .

• Burst Laser Prime and Prisma Burst Laser with Primed Pistol Gambit or Creeping Bullseye .

• The Beast Companions that can satisfy the critical chance requirements are:
 • All Kavats and Vulpaphylas with Bite .

• Huras Kubrow and Chesa Kubrow with Bite .
 • The requirement can be satisfied by other Kubrows and Predasites using Hunter Synergy and a primary weapon with sufficient critical chance, depending on the breed.

evidence.excerpt:
Acquisition
[ edit | edit source ]
 The mod can be bought from The Business for 20,000 Standing 20,000 after reaching Rank 3 - Doer with Solaris United .

Notes
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Despite the mod's description reading "over 50%", the buff will still be applied when the companion's crit chance is at 50% . In other words, the companion's crit chance needs to be ≥ 50%.

• Does not affect Amp damage.

• Critical damage multiplier is a flat final and follows the formula 1 + (tier * (crit multi - 1 + final)) where the first tier is yellow (eg. skana multi is 1.5x which is brought to 2.7x (2.7x on yellow, 4.4x on orange, 6.1x on red and so on) the impact lessens depending on modded critical multiplier)

• The Robotic Weapons that can satisfy the critical chance requirements without Riven Mods are:
 • Prime Laser Rifle , Vulcax and Vulklok with Point Strike , Laser Rifle with Critical Delay .

• Burst Laser Prime and Prisma Burst Laser with Primed Pistol Gambit or Creeping Bullseye .

• The Beast Companions that can satisfy the critical chance requirements are:
 • All Kavats and Vulpaphylas with Bite .

• Huras Kubrow and Chesa Kubrow with Bite .
 • The requirement can be satisfied by other Kubrows and Predasites using Hunter Synergy and a primary weapon with sufficient critical chance, depending on the breed.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 Tractor Beam is automatically acquired upon obtaining a MOA built with the Oloro Model .

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • The aim glide and gravity buff is stored in charges that regenerate once every 5s. Up to 3 buffs can be stored, and each lasts 5s.
 • The buff, its charges, and duration is indicated by a symbol in the UI.

• Only one stack of the buff can be activated before the player needs to touch the ground to activate another one.

• Once the buff is activated, it will last a full 5s regardless if the player is utilizing it. Initiating another aim glide after touching the ground consumes a charge, even if the ongoing charge’s duration hasn’t finished yet. However, the remaining duration is combined with the new buff's, despite the UI not clearly reflecting this.

• The player must be within 20m of the MOA for the buff to be applied. If the player goes out of range while the effect is active, it will persist until they stop aim gliding.

• The reduction to gravity only takes effect during aim glide.

• Despite not being in the description of the mod, the regeneration cooldown of charges is affected by the rank of Tractor Beam.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 Transfusion is automatically acquired upon obtaining a Vasca Kavat .

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • During bleedout, the Vasca Kavat will sacrifice 20% of its max health to revive its owner, restoring them to full Health and Shields, along with 5 seconds of Invulnerability .
 • Tranfusion will not work if the Kavat does not have enough health to sacrifice. It will also not work during Arbitrations , as the player cannot enter bleedout.

• Getting downed in Solo play will trigger Bleedout state regardless of the mod's cooldown.

• Has a 120 second cooldown between uses.
 • The cooldown will still progress even while the Vasca Kavat is incapacitated.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 Vacuum does not drop from any enemy, and is not obtainable from any mission. Instead, you will be given one copy every time you claim a Sentinel from your Foundry .

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Vacuum will still function while the Companion is Incapacitated .

• If affected by Confusion from Radiation , Vacuum will be disabled until the effect runs out.

• Vacuum will still pull the loot if you are in the Rift Plane , however, you will not be able to collect these items until you are no longer in the Rift Plane or you bring them in by entering Cataclysm .

• The following items cannot be attracted by Vacuum, despite not requiring to be picked up manually, but can still be attracted by Cosmic Crush :
 • Cetus Wisps

• Sentient Cores

• Eidolon Shards

• Profit-Taker Orb 's drops

• Exploiter Orb 's drops

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 The mod can be bought from Son for 20,000 Standing 20,000 after reaching Rank 3 - Associate with the Entrati .

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Each hit will remove 15% armor from the hit enemy. If the enemy was damaged by an ability within the past 10 seconds, each melee hit by the companion will also cause enemies within 9 meters of the hit enemy to have 15% of their armor removed.

• The only Sentinel weapon that counts as a melee attack is Deconstructor and Deconstructor Prime , but it can only be used by Helios and Helios Prime .

• Shockwaves from Seismic Bond will not trigger the armor strip.

• "Abilities" refers to those used by either your Warframe or operator/drifter.
 • Damage from Exalted weapons does not count.

• Damage from Companion precept abilities do not count.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 Viral Quills is automatically acquired upon obtaining a Panzer Vulpaphyla .

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Quills have 24% Critical Chance , 2.2x Critical Damage Multiplier and 2.2% Status Chance .

• Quills are affected by Critical Chance, Critical Damage, Elemental Damage , Status Chance and Elemental Conversion (e.g. Burning Claws ) mods present on the Panzer's Claws.

• Quills can apply status effects normally, according to their current damage types. However, the spores these quills produce do not inflict any status effect beyond Viral.

• If the quills inflict a Viral proc, a spore is created, similar to Saryn 's Spores , which inflict Viral damage every second and apply Viral procs.
 • Each spore deals damage and applies Viral procs independently.

• Spore damage is not affected by mods.

• A maximum of 10 spores can spawn per enemy.

• Spores can be spread by damaging or killing the afflicted enemy with an external source of damage.
 • Spores have a spreading radius of 15 meters.

• Saryn's Toxic Lash will also burst all spores on a target.

• If Panzer Vulpaphyla dies and enters its larval state ( Panzer Devolution ) all spores are removed.
 • The larva can fire Quills and initiate a new instance of Spores. These Spores remain active and spread only during this larval stage and will be removed from all targets when the Vulpaphyla respawns in full form.

• If Panzer Devolution is not equipped the spores will not be removed on death and will keep spreading like normal.

• Pairs well with Hunter Recovery , healing the Warframe for a percentage of the damage done by both the Quills and the Spores produced.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 Whiplash Mine is automatically acquired upon obtaining a MOA built with the Para Model .

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Cooldown of ~20s.

• Mine is thrown in an arc, which can bounce off obstacles/terrain. Maximum throw distance is 45m.

• Despite the mod saying it takes 3 seconds to pull enemies after tethering, it seems to be ~1.5s. However, the mine is thrown rather slowly, so depending on the distance it can take more than 3 seconds.

• Mine is considered a Projectile and will be affected by Mag's Magnetize , leaving it suspended midair until the Skill Duration ends.

• Ability can only trigger if you also attack with your gun, melee or exalted weapon while it's out of cooldown and enemies are nearby.

• Provides great Crowd Control as it knocks down and gathers Mobs on the ground, leaving them easily dispatched with AoE or Punch Through Weapons.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Can be purchased from Roky after reaching Rank Whozit with the Ventkids for 7,500 Standing 7,500 .

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Allows for the ability to double jump on K-drive.
 • With this mod equipped, any trick performed while in mid air will launch the user upwards.

• It is only possible to jump once while in mid air, all further tricks will respond as usual. Touching the ground restores the ability to double jump.

• There is no way to control the double jump height beyond fusing the mod. Any and all tricks will trigger the full height of the jump, regardless of velocity or height from the ground.

• The mod appears to use a value of 15m for the calculation of double jump height, although the base value of double jump height is 0m.

• Technically, double jump is always available even if the user does not possess this mod. However, because the double jump height is 0m, it has no effect.

sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Can be purchased from Roky after reaching Rank Logical with the Ventkids for 20,000 Standing 20,000 .

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Hildryn and Lavos do not get any extra boosted speed with this mod, although Hildryn's shields will still be drained by it.

• Energy Siphon and Energy Nexus will grant the player extra boost speed even with zero energy displayed, allowing an overall permanent increase to boost speed.

• Juice can generate energy while making use of the extra boost speed

• Here is a few abilities that help for the maximum energy conservation convenience if you jump off of your K-Drive to use them:
 • Wellspring from the Zenurik Focus tree (You do not have to jump off your K-drive to use this, just use transference while on the K-Drive, use the ability, and re-transference)

• Styanax 's 3rd ability Rally Point

• Arcane Steadfast at max rank can have a 20% chance for the next three abilities to cost no energy, this can be used for Styanax's Rally Point.

• With Preparation may be handy on your Warframe to spawn in with full energy.

• This mod combined with energy aiding mods like above are a great way to complete the K-Driven Trophy Challenge of 'Ride 1,000,000 meters on a K-Drive'.

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Cannot be equipped with Fury ( Primed ).

• The attack speed buff from Berserker Fury is additive with all other sources of attack speed, including mods and abilities.
 • For example, a full Berserker bonus in combination with Spoiled Strike will modify the weapon's attack speed to be 1.0 × (1 - 0.2 + 0.7 ) = 150% of its base.

• Stack duration fully refreshes upon killing and only expires one stack at a time, granting the mod an effective duration of 20 seconds.

sections.title: Drop Locations
sections.text: [ edit | edit source ]

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Blood Rush multiplies critical chance based on the Melee Combo Counter tier increase.
 • Without a Combo Counter, Blood Rush provides no bonus to critical chance. At 2x, it increases critical chance by 0.40 × (2 - 1) = 40% and at 3x, it increases critical chance by 0.40 × (3 - 1) = 80% . At the standard max Combo Counter of 12x, it increases critical chance by 440%.

• Pairs very well with Body Count , Drifting Contact , Gladiator Rush , or The Primary Dexterity & Secondary Dexterity arcanes which allow players to keep the Combo Counter up more consistently.

• Highly recommended to use the Focus/Naramon school. The Power Spike passive prevents total combo loss, decaying the counter by only 5 hits at a time. This makes it an exceptionally powerful school for any blood rush build.

• Since thrown attacks from Glaive weapons are affected by the Combo Counter, they will also receive any bonus from Blood Rush.

sections.text: [ edit | edit source ]

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Body Count increases the total melee combo duration (base: 5 seconds) to 17 seconds at max rank.
 • With Drifting Contact and Gladiator Rush , the combo duration can be further increased to 33 seconds.

• Body Count does not affect ability summoned melee weapons such as Exalted Blade , Hysteria and Primal Fury . Summoned melee weapons use their own summoned weapon combo counter. The melee combo counter stays present in the background and decreases with time as normal.
 • Body Count does, however, benefit non-channeled melee abilities such as Slash Dash , Landslide and Blade Storm .

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 Burning Hate could be obtained by reaching Rank 15 with Nightwave during Nora's Mix Volume 7 .

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Heat afflicted enemies that are damaged by the Hate will become more vulnerable to Status Damage from all sources. The status damage vulnerability persists even after the Heat status proc expires.
 • The heat status effect can be from any source, not just from the Hate .

• Direct hit damage and status effect damage from the Hate both trigger the vulnerability.
 • A heat status from the Hate itself will both apply the necessary heat status and then damage the target, applying the vulnerability for subsequent attacks.

• The damage vulnerability only applies to status procs dealt after the vulnerability is applied; It does not enhance status effects already on the enemy beforehand, nor any procs inflicted on the same swing that the vulnerability is applied.

• Damage increase is multiplicative with Melee Elementalist and Faction Damage Bonus .

• Damage increase is additive with Dante 's Final Verse - Pageflight 's Status Damage increase.

• Heat status that has been spread through Melee Influence applies the status damage vulnerability, both to the spread status procs and any future status procs.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • This mod can be purchased unranked from the Void Trader Baro Ki'Teer for 115,000 Credits 115,000 and 300 300 . Remember however that Baro Ki'Teer's stock changes with each appearance, and may not have this item available at every time.

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Once the buff triggers, the secondary weapon must be reloaded to gain the double magazine bonus; it does not automatically double the current magazine.

• Upon reloading, the extra magazine capacity is pulled from the player's secondary weapon ammo pool. If a player does not have enough reserve ammo to fully double the magazine, the magazine will use as much ammo as the player has.

• When the ability ends, the surplus ammo in the magazine (above its normal capacity) is returned to the player's secondary ammo pool.

• The timer for the buff is not reset if another melee kill is performed while it is active.

• Although they are considered Thrown Melee weapons, this mod cannot be equipped on Deconstructor or Deconstructor Prime due to these weapons having no direct synergy with the player's secondary weapon.

sections.title: Drop Locations
sections.text: [ edit | edit source ]

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • This damage does not apply to Slams and Heavy Slams .

• There is no limit to the number of status effects the mod is affected by.

• The bonus damage gained by this mod stacks additively with other damage mods like Pressure Point and Spoiled Strike to increase your melee damage (including proc damage like Slash ). Total damage is calculated as such:

 Total Damage = Base Damage × [1 + Damage Mods + (Condition Overload Multiplier × n)] × (1 + Elemental Mods) (with n being the number of unique status effects currently affecting the enemy)
 • The bonus damage of a new status effect is not applied to the hit which inflicted it (or its proc damage) – only subsequent strikes are amplified.
 • Gunblades' pellets hit consecutively and therefore can be amplified by other pellets of the same shot.

• Status procs may originate from any source, including primary and secondary weapons, Warframe abilities, companions, other players, or the environment.

• Impact , Puncture , Slash , Cold , Electricity , Heat , Toxin , Blast , Corrosive , Gas , Magnetic , Radiation , Viral , Void and Tau procs all count for the damage bonus. Additionally:
 • Lifted from Melee Heavy Attacks also counts.

• Microwave from Nukor and Kuva Nukor is a unique invisible status. Microwave procs have infinite duration.

• Knockdown while does not incur a visible status, still counts towards the damage bonus.
 • Note that conditions or abilities that prevent knockdowns (e.g. Bastille ) will prevent it from increasing damage.

• Since Lifted and knockdown will cancel out each other, the maximum number of status effects that can be applied to an enemy is 16.

• Radial status effects ( Blast , Electricity and Gas ) still get the bonus damage from this mod as it is part of Modded Base Damage , and it is calculated based on the initial target, not individually per enemy hit.

sections.text: [ edit | edit source ]

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Stacks with Finishing Touch for +160% bonus finisher damage.

• The "Initial Combo" bonus provided by this mod adds a flat number to the combo counter. When the combo counter is reset, either by using a heavy attack or through combo counter decay, it will reset to a minimum of this number.

• Aside from Stealth attacks, the following Warframe abilities can also leave enemies vulnerable to melee finishers, regardless if the finisher is performed in front or behind the enemy;
 • Ash 's Teleport .

• Banshee 's Savage Silence augment.
 • Savage Silence is required to make Silence open enemies to finishers, as the standard stun performed by the ability does not do so.

• Baruuk 's Lull

• Equinox ' Rest .
 • As any damage affected targets receive will make them fall to the ground, try to avoid attacking them if you plan to make use of Covert Lethality.

• Excalibur 's Radial Blind (power only, the slide attack Radial Blind from Exalted Blade does not open enemies to finishers).

• Gara 's passive may blind enemies when she casts an ability.

• Inaros ' Desiccation .
 • Do note that enemies are only open to melee finishers if they are facing Inaros when Desiccation is cast.

• Ivara 's Sleep Arrow .

• Mirage 's Prism .

• Valkyr 's Paralysis .
 • It is not advised to equip the Prolonged Paralysis augment, as it instead leaves enemies vulnerable to ground finishers .

• Wukong 's Cloud Walker .

[ edit | edit source ]
 • Makes Tennokai trigger after 4 melee inputs that hit an enemy.
 • Additional enemies hit beyond the first do not count as additional hits.
 • Gunblade shots are an exception to this.

• Multi-strike attacks do not count as additional hits.
 • Gunblade shots are an exception to this; attacks that fire two shots in succession will count as two hits. Multishot does not count.

• Heavy attacks do not count as a hit.
 • Performing a Heavy Slide is considered a hit.

• Remaining hits to Tennokai trigger are shown on the buff UI.

sections.title: Drop Locations

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • When blocking, threads of energy similar to Trinity 's Link will extend to all allies in range, using your warframe's energy color.
 • The mod's effect will only link to other players, and not Companions , objectives, or AI-controlled allies.

• Damage absorbed with the use of Electromagnetic Shielding will be converted into health for Iron Skin and Warding Halo .

• The mod's effective range cannot be modified by Reach or Primed Reach .

• Many abilities may be used without interrupting the link, as long as the Block is held.

• For reasons unknown, any Radiation damage or procs that allies receive will be reduced (and in the proc's case, nullified), but the damage or proc will not be transferred to the user.
 • If an ally is suffering a Radiation proc before a link is created, then the user will also suffer the proc once the link takes hold.

• Damage redirected to you does activate abilities that reflect damage, such as Trinity 's Link or Mesa 's Shatter Shield .

• Damage redirected to your Health will trigger Rage and/or Hunter Adrenaline 's energy conversion.

sections.title: Drop Locations
sections.text: [ edit | edit source ]

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Added in Update 8.0 (2013-05-23).

• Upon striking an enemy, all of the stored energy will be discharged. The strike can be a normal strike, slide attack or a heavy attack.
 • The stored energy will not discharge when striking terrain or a cargo container.

• Be careful not to hit a recently killed enemy, as it may discharge on swing contact.

• If the attack hits multiple targets, the bonus damage is only applied to a single target. Additionally, if the attack hits the same target multiple times, the bonus damage is only applied to one hit.

• Due to both the ratio and storage capacity scaling, the bonus damage maxes out after spending a total of 100 energy at any rank.

• A weapon charged with energy via Energy Channel will glow the energy color of the particular weapon, with pulses of energy washing over it regularly.

• Streamline affects energy stored by Energy Channel; it uses the adjusted ability cost.

• The bonus damage is added after the critical hit multiplier.

• The glowing effect will not apply to the Prova , nor will any other visual effects.

• The damage done by Elemental Mods (i.e. Molten Impact ) is amplified by this Mod.

• The damage is not amplified by damage increasing Mods (i.e. Pressure Point , Killing Blow ).

• Before Update 13.0 (2014-04-09), this mod was called Melee Channel.

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • This mod is best used for the following setups:
 • For weapons with a combination of high damage potential and attack speed, such as the Orthos Prime and Dual Kamas .

• For weapons with slow attack speed but high damage per hit to eliminate its weakness through slow attack speed, like the Jat Kittag .

• For weapons with stun capabilities to increase its chance to stun enemies.

• This mod affects Charge Attack release animation, but it does not affects charge time.

• Compared to Quickening , this mod costs the same number of points while giving 10% less attack speed and no combo count bonus.

• Cannot be equipped with Berserker Fury .

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • While blocking, enemies within 15m become taunted which will shift their focus to the user.
 • Duration is permanent.

• Effective range is not affected by Reach .

• The taunt does not affect enemies across the Rift Plane .

• The taunt is high priority and will steal aggro from other aggro-increasing abilities.

• The taunt overrides other targeting modifiers such as Radiation status and Nyx 's Chaos . Friendly fire is not disabled, so confused enemies can still incidentally damage, and be damaged by, their former allies.
