sections.text: Fishing CODEX The Glappid is a scavenger that feasts on the remains of dead fish. It has formed a symbiotic bond with the Seram Beetle which extracts and feeds upon any toxins ingested by the Glappid. “"By the Unum! Is that-? I can't remember the last time this species was seen in our waters. What did you use for bait?"” —Fisher Hai-Luk Glappid is a rare species of fish in the Plains of Eidolon. Biome: Ocean Activity: Nocturnal (Night time) Glappid Bait needed. Effective Spears: Peram Maximum Weight: 44 kg Rarity: Legendary Small Medium Large 1,200 Standing 1,200 1,500 Standing 1,500 2,000 Standing 2,000 Fish Meat x4 Fish Scales x5 Fish Oil x3 Seram Beetle Shell x1 Fish Meat x6 Fish Scales x7 Fish Oil x5 Seram Beetle Shell x1 Fish Meat x8 Fish Scales x9 Fish Oil x7 Seram Beetle Shell x1 Glappid Trophy “A trophy of a prized catch.” —In-Game Description Glappid Trophy is a Fishing Trophy Decoration that can be crafted and displayed in the player's Orbiter. The blueprint can be purchased from Fisher Hai-Luk for 12,500 Standing 12,500, requiring the rank of Kin with the Ostron. Manufacturing Requirements 5,000 1 25 25 5 Time: 1 hrs Rush: 10 Platinum 10 Market Price: N/A Blueprints Price: 12,500

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 Goopolla Spleens are acquired by cutting up Goopolla caught through Fishing . Go to Fisher Hai-Luk in Cetus, select the desired amount of Goopolla available, and select the " Cut Bait " option to extract the components. Each Goopolla cut yields one Goopolla Spleen.

 Alternatively, Fisher Hai-Luk can sell Goopolla Spleens in bundles of 20 among her rotating stock of " Daily Specials ", which can be bought for Platinum .

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 There are currently 3 ways of obtaining Grandmother Tokens:

 • Trading other Family member tokens with Grandmother . The Grandmother Token is always worth 50% more than the other tokens used to trade for it.

• Finding them in the Cambion Drift .

• Trading random assortment of Cambion Drift resources under the Mend the Family option with Grandmother.

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Although Treasurers can spawn prior to the completion of The Deadlock Protocol , they will not drop Granum Crowns until The Deadlock Protocol has been completed.

• Treasurers can spawn in Grineer Galleon tileset as well, given that the particular mission node is occupied by the Corpus. The tier of Granum Crown dropped is determined by enemy level.

• To prevent the Granum Crown from being dropped in Extraction zones and therefore unreachable, the Treasurer will move away from it if he is within 35 meters. In addition, if the Granum Crown is dropped in Extraction, it will be teleported to a safe spot.

• Granum Crown drops are not affected by Nekros Desecrate , Hydroid 's Pilfering Swarm , Ivara 's Prowl , Atlas Ore Gaze , Khora 's Pilfering Strangledome and Chesa Kubrow 's Retrieve .

• Granum Crowns are not affected by Resource Boosters .

• Nightmare Mode mission level modifier of +10 will affect the tier of the Granum Crown dropped.
 • Example: Nightmare version of the Jackal fight on Venus is level 16-18 (instead of 6-8) and the Treasurer will drop an Exemplar Granum Crown (instead of standard Granum Crown).

• Players cannot interact with the Golden Hand Tribute, Solaris captives, or Corpus Temple Relief console when there are enemies nearby.

• Only one Corpus Temple Relief room can spawn per mission.
 • The Sergeant has a high chance of spawning in a Corpus Temple Relief room.

sections.title: Usage
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Gravimags can be installed on an Archgun through the Actions tab on the Arsenal 's Upgrade section. Only Archguns that have been upgraded with an Orokin Catalyst can have Gravimags installed on them.

• Once an Archgun has been upgraded with a Gravimag, players can equip the upgraded Archgun in the Heavy Weapon tab of their Gear section, allowing the player to deploy an Archgun in ground combat via Archgun Deployer Gear item.

• A Gravimag is not required to be equipped to Necramechs called down via Necramech Summon .

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Prior to Update 29.6 (2020-12-18), Necramechs required Gravimag to use Archguns, thus their associated weapons Mausolon , Cortege , and Morgha all come with a pre-installed Gravimag.

• Mandonel can be immediately used in ground combat upon acquiring and thus does not require a Gravimag. However, players will still require the Archgun Deployer Gear to use it.

Usage
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Gravimags can be installed on an Archgun through the Actions tab on the Arsenal 's Upgrade section. Only Archguns that have been upgraded with an Orokin Catalyst can have Gravimags installed on them.

• Once an Archgun has been upgraded with a Gravimag, players can equip the upgraded Archgun in the Heavy Weapon tab of their Gear section, allowing the player to deploy an Archgun in ground combat via Archgun Deployer Gear item.

• A Gravimag is not required to be equipped to Necramechs called down via Necramech Summon .

Notes
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Prior to Update 29.6 (2020-12-18), Necramechs required Gravimag to use Archguns, thus their associated weapons Mausolon , Cortege , and Morgha all come with a pre-installed Gravimag.

• Mandonel can be immediately used in ground combat upon acquiring and thus does not require a Gravimag. However, players will still require the Archgun Deployer Gear to use it.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Heciphron can be acquired by mining blue mineral veins in the Cambion Drift.
 • Heciphron is most commonly found within Albrecht's Prospect, initiating a Tier 2 Isolation bounty is recommended to get to more mining nodes within the area.

• The caves within the Catabolic Gutter provide a large quantity of mining nodes and a solid spread of rarities.

• Hitting the bonus zone while mining is helpful for acquiring Heciphron.

• Heciphron can also be acquired from doing Requiem Obelisks in the Cambion Drift .
 • Killing enemies with Operator correctly under the Requiem Obelisks effect.

• Umbra kills while in Operator form counts as Operator kill.

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Heciphron can be traded at Otak in exchange for Otak Tokens in quantities of 4 to 25.

sections.title: Article body
sections.text: You're not supposed to be in here! You're going to ruin the surprise!The following article/section contains spoilers. Please complete Whispers in the Walls before continuing. Orokin secrets cannot remain secret forever! Start talking!The following article or section is conjecture. Conjecture contains unverified gameplay anecdotes or unofficial interpretations of the game's lore. Please do not use this as a primary source of critical information. Jahu GargoyleQuotes “A curious blueprint found in the memory banks of Albrecht Entrati's Pom-2.” —Albrecht's Blueprint The Jahu Gargoyle is a mysterious statue of unknown nature that was crafted during Whispers in the Walls. Additionally, a new variant of the statue known as the Vigile Jahu Gargoyle is introduced as a Clan Dojo decoration during Operation: Gargoyle's Cry. Crafting of the initial Jahu Gargoyle during Whispers in the Walls is titled Albrecht's Blueprint. Manufacturing Requirements 19 1 Time: 99 sec Rush: 0 Platinum 0 Market Price: N/A Blueprints Price: N/A Lore & History Overview Named after the Requiem word for 'Form', the Jahu Gargoyle appears to be a chimerical amalgamation of the three main members of the Cavia, possessing Fibonacci's head, Bird 3's wings and hind talons, and Tagfer's body and forelimbs. It was presumably designed by Albrecht Entrati before he traveled back to the year 1999. Albrecht's Curio Main article: Whispers in the Walls To complete The Kalymos Sequence, the Tenno is instructed by Albrecht Entrati to construct the Gargoyle, whose blueprint was stored within his Pom-2 console. After placing it within the Sanctum Anatomica and activating it, the Gargoyle automatically translates the Cavia's incoherent Voidtongue, allowing them to communicate with the Tenno and Loid. As the Murmur began to break into and corrupt the Sanctum, the Tenno is prompted to let Albrecht's Grimoire "speak with its own voice" in order to defeat The Fragmented Suzerain. Upon interacting with the Jahu Gargoyle, the Tenno places the book in front of the statue. It then opens up on its own, almost as if the Gargoyle itself is 'reading' the Grimoire. Murmur Telemetry Chorus Main article: Operation: Gargoyle's Cry To prevent the Murmur from further pervading reality, Fibonacci has devised a solution to detect their influence. He requests each of the Tenno Clans to construct a Vigile Jahu Gargoyle within their Dojo to create a 'living', system-wide surveillance system known as the Murmur Telemetry Chorus. However, a last-minute re-calibration necessitates the Tenno to hunt down The Fragmented and collect their Curses to ensure the system can warn of both incoming and outgoing threats. Trivia When crafting the Jahu Gargoyle during the quest, the credit cost and build time appear to create the number '1999'. A gargoyle that does not also act as a water spout, like the Jahu Gargoyle itself, is actually called a grotesque. This term is referenced in Operation: Gargoyle's Cry, where the player can spend currency called Grotesque Splinters to purchase items from the Vigile Jahu Gargoyle. Gallery The Vigile Jahu Gargoyle, as seen in Operation: Gargoyles Cry

After placing it within the Sanctum Anatomica and activating it, the Gargoyle automatically translates the Cavia's incoherent Voidtongue, allowing them to communicate with the Tenno and Loid.  Karkina Antennae are acquired by cutting up Karkina caught through Fishing . Go to Fisher Hai-Luk in Cetus, select the desired amount of Karkina available, and select the " Cut Fish " option to extract the components. Each Karkina cut yields one Karkina Antenna.

 Alternatively, Fisher Hai-Luk can sell Karkina Antennae in bundles of 10 among her rotating stock of " Daily Specials ", which can be bought for Platinum .

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 Kavat Genetic Codes can be earned when scanning alive Feral Kavats at a 25.0% chance (while their corpses may be scanned too for Cephalon Simaris standing - yet this will not award any codes). Alternatively, one can be bought for 5 Platinum 5 each in the Market or with the Kavat Starter Kit for 95 Platinum 95 . Bought separately, you will require 50 Platinum 50 to purchase the 10 required to start the incubation process.

 Vasca Kavats on the Plains of Eidolon do not give Kavat Genetic Codes when scanned.

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Resource Drop Chance Boosters and Resource Boosters do increase the number of codes obtained from a scan.

sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 Kavat Genetic Codes can be earned when scanning alive Feral Kavats at a 25.0% chance (while their corpses may be scanned too for Cephalon Simaris standing - yet this will not award any codes). Alternatively, one can be bought for 5 Platinum 5 each in the Market or with the Kavat Starter Kit for 95 Platinum 95 . Bought separately, you will require 50 Platinum 50 to purchase the 10 required to start the incubation process.

 Vasca Kavats on the Plains of Eidolon do not give Kavat Genetic Codes when scanned.

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Resource Drop Chance Boosters and Resource Boosters do increase the number of codes obtained from a scan.

sections.title: Article body
sections.text: I want more... Operator, please hurry! This story is getting quite good!This article is a stub. You can help WARFRAME Wiki by adding a sentence or two. Please do not use this article for critical in-game information!This article is archived. The content was relevant to an obsolete version of Warframe, and has since been removed, retrieved, and/or revamped. Time is relative. Choose when ready.This article refers to valid content that is currently unavailable to be acquired in the live version of the game.It may return to be available again in a future update or event. “Orokin devices used for navigating the solar winds.” —In-Game Description Kesslers were an uncommon resource that could be found in any Empyrean mission. They were used in researches and upgrading the Railjack. They seemed to drop most commonly around Saturn Proxima. Blueprints Requiring Kesslers Click to view the Blueprints requiring Kesslers Blueprint Type Quantity(Research) Lavan Apoc Mk II Ship Turret 315 Lavan Carcinnox Mk II Ship Turret 315 Lavan Cryophon Mk II Ship Turret 315 Lavan Engines Mk II Ship Component 315 Lavan Photor Mk II Ship Turret 315 Lavan Pulsar Mk II Ship Turret 315 Lavan Reactor Mk II Ship Component 315 Lavan Shield Array Mk II Ship Component 315 Squad Energy Restore (Large) x100 Gear (300) Zetki Apoc Mk II Ship Turret 390 Zetki Carcinnox Mk II Ship Turret 390 Zetki Cryophon Mk II Ship Turret 390 Zetki Engines Mk II Ship Component 390 Zetki Photor Mk II Ship Turret 390 Zetki Pulsar Mk II Ship Turret 390 Zetki Reactor Mk II Ship Component 390 Zetki Shield Array Mk II Ship Component 390 Total 5,640 (+300) Research x1 x3 x10 x30 x100 Last updated: Hotfix 29.9.1 (2021-02-24) Trivia The name Kesslers is probably a reference to Donald J. Kessler, an American astrophysicist and former NASA scientist known for his studies regarding space debris. In 1978 he coined the term Kessler syndrome, a theoretical scenario in which the density of objects in low Earth orbit is so high that collisions between them could result in even more space debris, fuelling additional collisions and making future space activities near-impossible. Patch History Update 29.10 (2021-03-19) Removed from drop tables. We wanted to reduce the number of Resources we introduced in our original Railjack launch. They'll remain in your Inventory as we’ll be looking at possibly reintroducing them at a later date. All Blueprints that required these items have been updated to reflect viable Resources, and respective drops have been swapped to Ticor Plate where appropriate. These Resources have also been removed from Helminths Bile Feeding menu. If you spot any mentions of these Resources that we might have missed please let us know! For Tenno who have partially contributed these Resources to Wreckage, the percentage of your contribution will be honoured for the Resource that replaces it. Ex: If you contributed 60% of the needed Copernics for a Carcinnox, that 60% contribution will be carried over when the Blueprints are updated. Update 27.0 (2019-12-13) Introduced.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 Khut-Khut Venom Sacs are acquired by cutting up Khut-Khut caught through Fishing . Go to Fisher Hai-Luk in Cetus, select the desired amount of Khut-Khut available, and select the " Cut Bait " option to extract the components. Each Khut-Khut cut yields one Khut-Khut Venom Sac.

 Alternatively, Fisher Hai-Luk can sell Khut-Khut Venom Sacs in bundles of 20 among her rotating stock of " Daily Specials ", which can be bought for Platinum .

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 In Duviri, players must travel to Kullervo's Hold , which only appears during the Anger, Fear, or Sorrow Spirals. In The Lone Story mode, Kullervo may appear as a Spiral event, while in The Duviri Experience , players must talk to The Warden to engage in combat with the Warframe (if the Warden doesn't spawn, progress the Spiral events until Kullervo appears).

 After defeating the Spiral's Orowyrm , Kullervo's Banes are awarded: 4 (30%), 5 (40%), or 6 (30%) are gained in Normal mode, while 6 (30%), 7 (40%), or 8 (30%) are gained in The Steel Path . These amounts are not affected by Resource Boosters . If you fight Kullervo after defeating the Orowyrm, the Kullervo's Banes are awarded immediately upon his defeat.

sections.title: Usage
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 This section is transcluded from Acrithis § Kullervo's Archive . To change it, please edit the transcluded page .
 Kullervo's Bane can be used to purchase Kullervo , Rauta and Credits . 42 are needed to purchase all parts of Kullervo, and 30 are needed to purchase all parts of Rauta, for a total of 72 Kullervo's Bane needed to purchase both.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Upon completion of The Duviri Paradox and Angels of the Zariman , and unlocking The Steel Path , players can earn Kunai Incarnon Genesis from The Circuit 's Steel Path to place on their Kunai with the help of Cavalero in the Chrysalith . This Incarnon Genesis form grants it evolutions to a transformation and newfound strength.

• Purchased from Cavalero for 120 Platinum 120 , complete with the resources used in its installation. This purchase can only be made once .

sections.title: Article body
sections.text: Fishing CODEX The Infestation has suborned these fish to its own purposes, using them as antibodies to repel the non-Infested. They swim through and above the Exocrine found on Deimos’ surface. Kymaeros is an infested fish in the Cambion Drift. Biome: Surface Activity: Fass/Vome Maximum Weight: 16 kg Rarity: Common Small Medium Large Benign Infested Tumor x2 Ferment Bladder x2 Saturated Muscle Mass x1 Benign Infested Tumor x3 Ferment Bladder x3 Saturated Muscle Mass x1 Benign Infested Tumor x6 Ferment Bladder x6 Saturated Muscle Mass x1 Trivia Duroid, Aquapulmo and Kymaeros respectively appear to be the pure, hybrid and fully infested version of the same creature. Kymaeros Trophy “A trophy of a prized catch.” —In-Game Description Kymaeros Trophy is a Fishing Trophy Decoration that can be crafted and displayed in the player's Orbiter. The blueprint can be purchased from Daughter for 1,500 Standing 1,500, requiring the rank of Stranger with the Entrati. Manufacturing Requirements 5,000 1 25 30 1,800 Time: 1 hrs Rush: 10 Platinum 10 Market Price: N/A Blueprints Price: 1,500 Gallery Concept art Patch History Update 29.0 (2020-08-25) Introduced. Last updated: Update 29.0 (2020-08-25)

sections.title: Drop Locations
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • 10-15 are earned from vanquishing a Technocyte Coda .

• 1 per Technocyte Coda defeated past the first in the Technocyte Coda Concert, regardless of vanquish or convert, up to 3 in a full squad.

• 10% chance from a Parazon Mercy on a Technocyte Coda Duet with Quick Correct mod equipped.

sections.title: Usage
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 Live Heartcells are used to purchase Coda weapons from Eleanor in the Höllvania Central Mall under the prompt "Browse Merchandise". The weapons are offered in two batches that cycles every four days, each with a random bonus element. The weapons are eligible for Valence Fusion .

 • The minimum number of Live Heartcells needed to purchase each Coda weapon once is 140 (10*14).

• The absolute maximum number of Live Heartcells to purchase each Coda weapon and fully upgrade each via Valence Fusion is 1400 (10*10*14).

sections.title: Article body
sections.text: CODEX This carnivorous plant can be found growing in the wilderness on Lua. Lunar Pitchers are Plants found only on Lua's Orokin Moon, planted among other decorative plants, inside rooms, and on the lunar soil. Usage Checklist for Lunar Pitcher Item Type Quantity Seeding Step Ephemera Cosmetic 50 Twilight Apothic Gear 6 Last updated: Hotfix 38.0.12 (2025-02-20) Farming Locations These are based on opinions and may not be 100% true. These should be viewed as advice for finding the resources until better facts are proven. Target Planet Name Type Level Tile Set Lua Copernicus Capture 25 - 30 Orokin Moon Gathering Tips Oxylus's Botanist will automatically loot plants within range. Trivia The plant's codex description references how Pitcher plants prey on insects (and in some cases, shrews) by luring them into its "pitcher", whose inner surface is slippery, which causes any unfortunate animal to fall into a pool of digestive juices and drown. It is unknown if the Lunar Pitcher has any biological relation to the Dusklight Sarracenia. Two overgrown Lunar Pitchers can be found in the Helminth Room. There can sometimes spawn a Lunar Pitcher in the extraction tile that is only barely scannable since the terrain almost completely covers it. Two small portions of it are scannable from two different angles. Bugs If you spawn on the tile-set that starts you outside with a broken bridge above you requiring you to go around the right to enter the base, the Lunar Pitcher will not spawn. Quickly complete the objective and try again. As the tile-set is random each time, this can quickly frustrate players who spawn on this bugged tile-set multiple times in a row rendering The Silver Grove quest line impossible to complete until it changes. (Fixed in Update 25.7 (2019-08-29)) Media Lunar Pitcher in the Codex. A Lunar Pitcher spawn, inside one of the white plants on the Moon tileset. 2 Lunar Pitchers, in a side room on the Moon tileset. Another Lunar Pitcher spawn, underneath extraction on the Moon tileset. Another Lunar Pitcher spawn, at the base of one of the white trees on the Moon tileset. Patch History Update 39.0 (2025-06-25) Players will no longer have to scan plants to earn their extracts. Now, plants like Moonlight Dragonlily and Ruk’s Claw will have a “Hold to Collect” context action to pick them up in-mission. Oxylus’ Botanist Precept has been changed to automatically pick any plants within 50m over 2s (at max rank). This also applies to the Silver Grove Quest, which requires players to collect certain plant resources to progress. The objective descriptions have been updated to specify “gathering” instead of “scanning”. The scanning mechanic was overly complicated for new players, so this simplification should benefit Plant Extract gathering for Tenno across the board. Update 25.7 (2019-08-29) Fixed issue with Lunar Pitchers not spawning in certain areas in the Orokin Moon tileset. Update: The Silver Grove (2016-08-19) Introduced.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Upon completion of The Duviri Paradox and Angels of the Zariman , and unlocking The Steel Path , players can earn Magistar Incarnon Genesis from The Circuit 's Steel Path to place on their Magistar with the help of Cavalero in the Chrysalith . This Incarnon Genesis form grants it evolutions to a transformation and newfound strength.

• Purchased from Cavalero for 120 Platinum 120 , complete with the resources used in its installation. This purchase can only be made once .

sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 Mawfish Bones are acquired by cutting up Mawfish caught through Fishing . Go to Fisher Hai-Luk in Cetus, select the desired amount of Mawfish available, and select the " Cut Bait " option to extract the components. Each Mawfish cut yields one Mawfish Bones.

 Alternatively, Fisher Hai-Luk can sell Mawfish Bones in bundles of 20 among her rotating stock of " Daily Specials ", which can be bought for Platinum .

sections.title: Article body
sections.text: Fishing CODEX Its gaping maw allows it to scoop up smaller fish as it swims by them. Mawfish is a species of fish in the Plains of Eidolon. Biome: Lake Activity: Diurnal (Day time) Effective Spears: Lanzo/Tulok/Peram Maximum Weight: 30 kg Rarity: Common Small Medium Large 25 Standing 25 35 Standing 35 50 Standing 50 Fish Meat x3 Fish Scales x1 Fish Oil x2 Mawfish Bones x1 Fish Meat x4 Fish Scales x2 Fish Oil x3 Mawfish Bones x1 Fish Meat x5 Fish Scales x3 Fish Oil x4 Mawfish Bones x1 Trivia Two Mawfish can be seen swimming in the Orbiter's Helminth Infirmary. These fish existed alongside the Helminth's introduction in Update 19.5 (2016-12-22), and their models were recycled as fishing elements in the Plains of Eidolon in Update 22.0 (2017-10-12). Mawfish Trophy “A trophy of a prized catch.” —In-Game Description Mawfish Trophy is a Fishing Trophy Decoration that can be crafted and displayed in the player's Orbiter. The blueprint can be purchased from Fisher Hai-Luk for 2,000 Standing 2,000, requiring the rank of Offworlder with the Ostron. Manufacturing Requirements 5,000 1 25 25 2,000 Time: 1 hrs Rush: 10 Platinum 10 Market Price: N/A Blueprints Price: 2,000

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Can be purchased from Bird 3 for 50,000 Standing 50,000 requiring Rank 3 - Colleague with Cavia .

• Can be awarded from Netracell missions.

• Can be awarded from Deep Archimedea missions.

• Can be purchased from the Market for 20 Platinum 20 . Will not appear until the player has completed the Whispers in the Walls quest.

• Can be rewarded from the 1999 Calendar . (may not always be available due to randomized weekly awards)

• Can be rewarded from The Descendia after clearing Infernum 21 . (may not always be available due to randomized weekly awards)

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Upon completion of The Duviri Paradox and Angels of the Zariman , and unlocking The Steel Path , players can earn Miter Incarnon Genesis from The Circuit 's Steel Path to place on their Miter with the help of Cavalero in the Chrysalith . This Incarnon Genesis form grants it evolutions to a transformation and newfound strength.

• Purchased from Cavalero for 120 Platinum 120 , complete with the resources used in its installation. This purchase can only be made once .

sections.title: Article body
sections.text: For the daytime form, see Sunlight Dragonlily. CODEX This uncommon plant can only be found at night. Moonlight Dragonlilies are Plants found only in Earth's Grineer Forests during nighttime, often growing near grassy areas or bodies of water. Usage Checklist for Moonlight Dragonlily Item Type Quantity Lapis Antitoxin Gear 1 Nightfall Apothic Gear 6 Topaz Antitoxin Gear 2 Vermillion Antitoxin Gear 4 Last updated: Hotfix 38.0.12 (2025-02-20) Farming Locations These are based on opinions and may not be 100% true. These should be viewed as advice for finding the resources until better facts are proven. Note that the Moonlight Dragonlily can only spawn when it is nighttime on the Grineer Forest tileset. Target Planet Name Type Level Tile Set Earth Mantle Capture 2 - 4 Grineer Forest Earth E Prime Exterminate 1 - 3 Grineer Forest Earth Cervantes Sabotage 4 - 6 Grineer Forest Gathering Tips Oxylus' Botanist will automatically loot plants within range. A good mission to look into is Cervantes, Earth or E Prime, Earth on the lowermost levels of the maps around the air burst vents can yield 4-5 scans possible without boosters. Trivia The Dragonlily's name is derived from one of the Dracunculus vulgaris' nicknames. Its appearance is based on blossomed Liliums, a genus of herbaceous flowering plants growing from bulbs that are considered true lilies. On Lith, Earth, two Moonlight Dragonlillies always spawn in the same place. From the starting area, hug the left border of the map and keep progressing to find the first one. The second one can be found just past the first one, in a tunnel by hugging the left border. Media Moonlight Dragonlily in the Codex. Warframe Moonlight Dragonlily 2 Warframe Moonlight Dragonlily Warframe Moonlight Dragonlily 3 Warframe Moonlight Dragonlily 4 Patch History Update 39.0 (2025-06-25) Players will no longer have to scan plants to earn their extracts. Now, plants like Moonlight Dragonlily and Ruk’s Claw will have a “Hold to Collect” context action to pick them up in-mission. Oxylus’ Botanist Precept has been changed to automatically pick any plants within 50m over 2s (at max rank). This also applies to the Silver Grove Quest, which requires players to collect certain plant resources to progress. The objective descriptions have been updated to specify “gathering” instead of “scanning”. The scanning mechanic was overly complicated for new players, so this simplification should benefit Plant Extract gathering for Tenno across the board. Update: The Silver Grove (2016-08-19) Icons in Foundry changed to represent respective plants instead of vials with colored liquids. Update 11.5 (2013-12-19) Introduced via The Cicero Crisis.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 Mortus Horns are acquired by cutting up Mortus Lungfish caught through Fishing . Go to Fisher Hai-Luk in Cetus, select the desired amount of Mortus Lungfish available, and select the " Cut Fish " option to extract the components. Each Mortus Lungfish cut yields one Mortus Horn.

 Alternatively, Fisher Hai-Luk can sell Mortus Horns in bundles of 10 among her rotating stock of " Daily Specials ", which can be bought for Platinum .

sections.title: Article body
sections.text: Fishing CODEX Displays blood-splattered pattern on its scales and has its ribs exposed through open cavities along both flanks. When predators approach it lies still at the bottom of the sand banks, disguised as a carcass in hopes of being ignored. Mortus Lungfish is a species of fish in the Plains of Eidolon. Biome: Pond Activity: Cathemeral (Day and Night time) Effective Spears: Lanzo/Peram Maximum Weight: 40 kg Rarity: Uncommon Due to the lack of other pond fish, Lungfish can be found very frequently during the night compared to daytime. Small Medium Large 100 Standing 100 125 Standing 125 200 Standing 200 Fish Meat x3 Fish Scales x1 Fish Oil x4 Mortus Horn x1 Fish Meat x4 Fish Scales x2 Fish Oil x6 Mortus Horn x1 Fish Meat x5 Fish Scales x3 Fish Oil x8 Mortus Horn x1 Mortus Lungfish Trophy “A trophy of a prized catch.” —In-Game Description Mortus Lungfish Trophy is a Fishing Trophy Decoration that can be crafted and displayed in the player's Orbiter. The blueprint can be purchased from Fisher Hai-Luk for 5,000 Standing 5,000, requiring the rank of Visitor with the Ostron. Manufacturing Requirements 5,000 1 25 25 1,200 Time: 1 hrs Rush: 10 Platinum 10 Market Price: N/A Blueprints Price: 5,000 Trivia A giant, reddish Mortus Lungfish can be seen swimming in the Orbiter's Helminth Infirmary. This fish existed alongside the Helminth's introduction in Update 19.5 (2016-12-22), and its model was recycled as fishing elements in the Plains of Eidolon in Update 22.0 (2017-10-12).

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 There are currently 3 ways of obtaining Mother Tokens:

 • Completing Bounties given out by Mother .

• Finding them in the Cambion Drift .

• Trading random assortment of Cambion Drift resources under the Mend the Family option with Grandmother.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 Murkray Livers are acquired by cutting up Murkray caught through Fishing . Go to Fisher Hai-Luk in Cetus , select the desired amount of Murkray available, and select the " Cut Fish " option to extract the components. Each Murkray cut yields one Murkray Liver.

 Murkray Liver was also made available from Nakak in Cetus during Operation: Plague Star for 750 Standing 750 Operational Supply Standing and 1,500 Credits 1,500 , with each purchase giving one unit of Murkray Liver.

 They can also occasionally drop from Tusk Thumper in quantities around 14 or so with a 33% drop rate

sections.title: Article body
sections.text: Fishing CODEX This exceptionally rare breed of fish is almost extinct, as its gilded Orokin flesh has a special savor for predators. It warily conceals itself in caves. “"Now, this takes me back. A Myxostomata! The original Orokin stock was all but extinct. This one must have been hiding in a deep dark artery somewhere. Look at that gilding. He's an antique, aren't you? Almost seems a shame to bust him open."” —Daughter Myxostomata is a rare uncorrupted Orokin fish in the Cambion Drift. Biome: Cave (Hotspot. Glowing parts) Activity: Vome Processed Vome Residue required Maximum Points: 8 Rarity: Rare Requires: Friends to start spawning (Rank 4 Entrati Standing) Tradable Basic Adorned Magnificent Benign Infested Tumor x2 Tubercular Gill System x4 Cranial Foremount x2 Benign Infested Tumor x4 Tubercular Gill System x6 Cranial Foremount x2 Benign Infested Tumor x6 Tubercular Gill System x10 Cranial Foremount x2 Trivia Myxostomata, Ostimyr and Cryptosuctus respectively appear to be the pure, hybrid and fully infested version of the same creature. Myxostomata can be found in caves near Infested Seraglio. Myxostomata Trophy “A trophy of a prized catch.” —In-Game Description Myxostomata Trophy is a Fishing Trophy Decorations that can be crafted and displayed in the player's Orbiter. The blueprint can be purchased from Daughter for 10,000 Standing 10,000, requiring the rank of Family with the Entrati. Manufacturing Requirements 5,000 1 25 30 1 Time: 1 hrs Rush: 10 Platinum 10 Market Price: N/A Blueprints Price: 10,000 Gallery Concept art Patch History Update 29.0 (2020-08-25) Introduced. Last updated: Update 29.0 (2020-08-25)

sections.text: Fishing CODEX The Namaes has evolved the ability to tense its tail muscles and use its tail as a fearsome weapon. Namaes is a species of fish in Duviri.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 Namalon can be acquired from two different sources:

 • Mining yellow mineral veins in the Cambion Drift

• Storage containers found in the Bonus vaults found during Isolation Vault bounties

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • They can be traded at Otak in exchange for Otak Token s in quantities of 7 to 25.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Upon completion of The Duviri Paradox and Angels of the Zariman , and unlocking The Steel Path , players can earn Nami Solo Incarnon Genesis from The Circuit 's Steel Path to place on their Nami Solo with the help of Cavalero in the Chrysalith . This Incarnon Genesis form grants it evolutions to a transformation and newfound strength.

• Purchased from Cavalero for 120 Platinum 120 , complete with the resources used in its installation. This purchase can only be made once .

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Evolution IV's unlock challenge requires manually equipping the melee, either by holding the weapon swap key (default F  ) or going into a mission with only the melee weapon equipped.

evidence.excerpt:

This Incarnon Genesis form grants it evolutions to a transformation and newfound strength.

[ edit | edit source ]
 • Narmer Isoplast are primarily used for crafting weapons and Warframes from The New War .

• Narmer Isoplast can be traded to The Quills and Vox Solaris Syndicates for 2,000 Standing each.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 Norg Brains are acquired by cutting up Norg caught through Fishing . Go to Fisher Hai-Luk in Cetus, select the desired amount of Norg available, and select the " Cut Fish " option to extract the components. Each Norg cut yields one Norg Brain.

 Norg Brain was also made available from Nakak in Cetus during Operation: Plague Star for 750 Standing 750 Operational Supply Standing and 1,500 Credits 1,500 , with each purchase giving one unit of Norg Brain.

 Norg Brain can also drop from Tusk Thumpers on the Plains of Eidolon .

sections.title: Article body
sections.text: Fishing CODEX This fish inhabits the shallows and feeds of crabs and other small crustaceans. When threatened it forces air into its brain to give it the impression of being much bigger than it normally is. Norg is a rare species of fish in the Plains of Eidolon. Biome: Lake Activity: Nocturnal (Night time) Norg Bait needed. Hotspot needed. Effective Spears: Peram/Shockprod Maximum Weight: 40 kg Rarity: Rare Small Medium Large 500 Standing 500 650 Standing 650 1,000 Standing 1,000 Fish Meat x2 Fish Scales x5 Fish Oil x3 Norg Brain x1 Fish Meat x3 Fish Scales x7 Fish Oil x5 Norg Brain x1 Fish Meat x4 Fish Scales x10 Fish Oil x6 Norg Brain x1 Norg Trophy “A trophy of a prized catch.” —In-Game Description Norg Trophy is a Fishing Trophy Decoration that can be crafted and displayed in the player's Orbiter. The blueprint can be purchased from Fisher Hai-Luk for 10,000 Standing 10,000, requiring the rank of Surah with the Ostron. Manufacturing Requirements 5,000 1 25 25 5 Time: 1 hrs Rush: 10 Platinum 10 Market Price: N/A Blueprints Price: 10,000

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Orokin Catalysts are often referred to by players as 'blue potatoes' (and Orokin Reactors 'golden potatoes'), or in some cases, simply 'potatoes'. This originated from a short animation called "War friends" on YouTube; this was later tweeted by the Warframe Twitter and referenced by the Devs. [1]
 • The Potato T-shirt available in the official Warframe merchandise store is a reference to this.

• "Potato" is referenced again during A Man of Few Words when Darvo steals a "Potent Orokin Technical Augmentation and Tactical Offensive" device.

• Weapons bought with platinum from the Market come pre-installed with a Catalyst and their own weapon slot.

• Once applied to a weapon, it cannot be taken off to use on another weapon.
 • If the player sacrifices a catalyzed weapon in the creation of another weapon (for example, sacrificing a fully upgraded Magnus to build the Akmagnus ), the Catalyst is not transferred to the new weapon. The new weapon will require its own Catalyst.

• Orokin Catalysts/Reactors are not removed after applying a Forma.

• Weapons received as rewards (Twitch drops, direct quest rewards with no blueprints such as the Broken War ) come pre-installed with a catalyst.

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Warframes and Companions purchased with Platinum come with Orokin Reactors pre-installed.

• Once used on a Warframe, Archwing, or Companion, an Orokin Reactor cannot be taken back off to be used elsewhere. This also applies to the Orokin Catalyst .

• Every Warframe's maximum Mod Capacity is 78, this can be achieved by adding an Orokin Reactor to the frame and placing certain maxed Aura mods in the Aura Slot with a matching Polarity — 30 [Base] × 2 [Orokin Reactor] + 9 [Max Rank Steel Charge Aura] × 2 [Matching Polarity] = 78.
 • The only exception to this is Jade, who can reach a Mod Capacity of 96 due to her having 2 aura slots.

• With matching polarities for every mod (by expending Forma ), the maximum mod capacity ranges from a minimum 138 to a maximum 148 (due to rounding of energy costs). As of Update 14, either value cannot be exceeded.

sections.title: Article body
sections.text: Fishing CODEX Crammed with redundant, mutated internal organs, this pungent fish mingles Orokin and Infested ancestry. It is confined to the Exocrine and is only active by the light of the Wyrm Fass. Ostimyr is an Infested-Orokin hybrid fish in the Cambion Drift. Biome: Surface (Hotspot) Activity: Fass Fass Residue recommended. Maximum Points: 8 Rarity: Uncommon Basic Adorned Magnificent Benign Infested Tumor x3 Tubercular Gill System x2 Ferment Bladder x2 Saturated Muscle Mass x1 Benign Infested Tumor x4 Tubercular Gill System x3 Ferment Bladder x3 Saturated Muscle Mass x1 Benign Infested Tumor x6 Tubercular Gill System x4 Ferment Bladder x4 Saturated Muscle Mass x1 Trivia Myxostomata, Ostimyr and Cryptosuctus respectively appear to be the pure, hybrid and fully infested version of the same creature. Ostimyr Trophy “A trophy of a prized catch.” —In-Game Description Ostimyr Trophy is a Fishing Trophy Decoration that can be crafted and displayed in the player's Orbiter. The blueprint can be purchased from Daughter for 3,000 Standing 3,000, requiring the rank of Acquaintance with the Entrati. Manufacturing Requirements 5,000 1 25 30 1,100 Time: 1 hrs Rush: 10 Platinum 10 Market Price: N/A Blueprints Price: 3,000 Gallery Patch History Update 29.0 (2020-08-25) Introduced. Last updated: Update 29.0 (2020-08-25)

sections.title: Usage
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 Pathos Clamp can be used to purchase the Drifter melee weapons bundled together with their Warframe-compatible blueprints from Teshin's Cave . Syam , Azothane and Edun can be purchased for 50 Pathos Clamp , while the Argo & Vel and Sampotes can be purchased for 60, totaling to 270 Pathos Clamps.

 Acrithis , found in both the Dormizone and Duviri, also sells Orokin Reactor s, Orokin Catalyst s, Exilus Warframe Adapter , Exilus Weapon Adapter , Primary Arcane Adapter , Secondary Arcane Adapter , Forma Blueprint, Veiled Riven Mods , and Kuva for 10-25 Pathos Clamp .

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • To acquire all current Drifter Melee weapons, Incarnon Genesis upgrades of every type, Kullervo , and Rauta , players will need 1210 Pathos Clamp . Requiring 51 Steel Path runs in which you do the Undecroft side quests, 80 Steel Path Isleweaver runs or 121 Non Steel Path runs without Undecroft side quests.

• Not affected by Resource Boosters .

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Awarded from Temporal Archimedea with certain research points.
 • 28 Points (Elite): Pix Chip x 6

• 37 Points (Elite): Pix Chip x 9

• Certain Peely Pix will reward an additional Pix Chip for completing a stage with the Pix equipped in exchange for an additional debuff, up to 3 extra Pix Chip s. Only 1 additional Pix Chip will be rewarded per stage; repeating a stage using a different Peely Pix will not give another Pix Chip.
 • It Sees You periodically spawns a hostile Antimatter Drop that will chase you throughout the selected mission.

• Old Pizza gives any damage received during the selected mission a chance to inflict a Toxin proc.

• Optimism gradually builds up Cold procs every few seconds, freezing the player solid for 3 seconds if 10 procs are allowed to accumulate. Rolling or Void Slinging will remove 3 stacks.

• Once ten duplicates of a given Peely Pix have been obtained, enough to upgrade it to Chromatic, any excess copies obtained via Peely Paks are automatically converted to 1 Pix Chip each.

sections.title: Usage
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 Pix Chip s can be traded to Kaya for Peely Paks, Vosfor Cache (200), Display - Peely Pix decoration, and Arcane Enhancements Arcane Universal Fallout , Arcane Hot Shot , and Arcane Escapist .

 Arcanes have a weekly purchase limit of 1.

evidence.excerpt:
Acquisition
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Awarded from Temporal Archimedea with certain research points.
 • 28 Points (Elite): Pix Chip x 6

• 37 Points (Elite): Pix Chip x 9

• Certain Peely Pix will reward an additional Pix Chip for completing a stage with the Pix equipped in exchange for an additional debuff, up to 3 extra Pix Chip s. Only 1 additional Pix Chip will be rewarded per stage; repeating a stage using a different Peely Pix will not give another Pix Chip.
 • It Sees You periodically spawns a hostile Antimatter Drop that will chase you throughout the selected mission.

• Old Pizza gives any damage received during the selected mission a chance to inflict a Toxin proc.

• Optimism gradually builds up Cold procs every few seconds, freezing the player solid for 3 seconds if 10 procs are allowed to accumulate. Rolling or Void Slinging will remove 3 stacks.

• Once ten duplicates of a given Peely Pix have been obtained, enough to upgrade it to Chromatic, any excess copies obtained via Peely Paks are automatically converted to 1 Pix Chip each.

Usage
[ edit | edit source ]
 Pix Chip s can be traded to Kaya for Peely Paks, Vosfor Cache (200), Display - Peely Pix decoration, and Arcane Enhancements Arcane Universal Fallout , Arcane Hot Shot , and Arcane Escapist .

 Arcanes have a weekly purchase limit of 1.

• Pustulent Cognitive Nodules can also be obtained through the Requiem Pylons, and Rolizor Infested Cysts, both of which are scattered throughout the Cambion Drift

[ edit | edit source ]
 Pyrus Essence can be gained on either Earth , Mercury , Ceres , or Saturn by knocking down and capturing Pyrus Essence Carrier , Eximus -like units that drop Pyrus Essence upon being captured.

 The amount of Pyrus Essence gained per capture depends on the planet, with Essence Carriers on Earth, Mercury, Ceres, and Saturn dropping 1, 2, 3, and 4 Pyrus Essence respectively.

 Players are required to obtain a total of 30 Pyrus Essence in the event.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 The reusable blueprint can be purchased from Old Man Suumbaat for 10,000 Standing 10,000 , requiring the rank of Rank 4 Surah with the Ostron .

 Complete Radian Sentirums are also available from Nakak in Cetus during Operation: Plague Star for 750 Standing 750 Operational Supply Standing and 1,500 Credits 1,500 each.

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • The Ostron faction requires 1 regular Sentirum to advance from Surah to Kin , not forged to Radian Sentirum.

evidence.excerpt:

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 Eidolon Gantulysts will drop one Radiant Shard while Eidolon Hydrolysts will drop two Radiant Shards if they are captured with charged Eidolon Lures at the final stage of the fight.

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Necessary in order to summon the Hydrolyst at the Eidolon shrine , provided the Gantulyst was captured successfully.

• Radiant Eidolon Shards can be converted into 40,000 Focus in the respective Base of Operations transference interaction screen. To do so, players can go to Focus Conversion to the lower right corner of the screen when viewing an unlocked school's ability tree, then selecting how many Shards they want to redeem.
 • The Focus points provided by converting these does not affect the daily cap, allowing players to continue gaining Focus beyond the daily cap.

evidence.excerpt:
Acquisition
[ edit | edit source ]
 Eidolon Gantulysts will drop one Radiant Shard while Eidolon Hydrolysts will drop two Radiant Shards if they are captured with charged Eidolon Lures at the final stage of the fight.

Notes
[ edit | edit source ]

• Radiant Eidolon Shards can be converted into 40,000 Focus in the respective Base of Operations transference interaction screen. To do so, players can go to Focus Conversion to the lower right corner of the screen when viewing an unlocked school's ability tree, then selecting how many Shards they want to redeem.
 • The Focus points provided by converting these does not affect the daily cap, allowing players to continue gaining Focus beyond the daily cap.

 The Blueprint for the Relay Strut Component is attached in a message from Cressa Tal to the player in their inbox and is reusable.

 Players are required to craft 5 Relay Strut Component, which will need a total of 75 Trembera Essence, for the event.

sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 Riven Sliver s can be traded to Palladino in Iron Wake on Earth after completion of Chains of Harrow . Many items have weekly purchase limits: Requiem Relics have a purchase limit of 10 per week, Riven Transmuters have a purchase limit of 3 per week, while the Credits , Endo , Kuva , Requiem Ultimatum , Rivens , and Veiled Riven Cipher can only be purchased once per week. Purchase limits reset on Monday 00:00 UTC.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Two transmuters are guaranteed to drop upon capturing an Eidolon Hydrolyst in the Plains of Eidolon at night. Killing the Hydrolyst will not drop Riven transmuters.

• Can be purchased for 180 Vessel Capillaries from Loid in Sanctum Anatomica .

• Can be purchased for 10 Riven Sliver s from Palladino in Iron Wake on Earth with a purchase limit of 3 per week, requires completion of Chains of Harrow .

sections.title: Article body
sections.text: CODEX This plant was introduced to arid regions across the Origin system, for its ability to collect moisture in harsh environments. Ruk's Claws are Plants found only in Mars' Grineer Settlements, usually in damp areas shaded from the sun. Usage Checklist for Ruk's Claw Item Type Quantity Twilight Apothic Gear 6 Last updated: Hotfix 38.0.12 (2025-02-20) Farming Locations These are based on opinions and may not be 100% true. These should be viewed as advice for finding the resources until better facts are proven. Target Planet Name Type Level Tile Set Mars Ara Capture 10 - 12 Grineer Settlement Mars Hellas Exterminate 8 - 10 Grineer Settlement Gathering Tips Oxylus' Botanist will automatically loot plants within range. Trivia Ruk's Claw is named after General Sargas Ruk. Media Ruk's Claw in the Codex. 2 Ruk's Claw spawns. Commonly spawns on the Grineer Settlement tileset (Mars). This is what Ruk's Claw looks like in-game. Patch History Update 39.0 (2025-06-25) Players will no longer have to scan plants to earn their extracts. Now, plants like Moonlight Dragonlily and Ruk’s Claw will have a “Hold to Collect” context action to pick them up in-mission. Oxylus’ Botanist Precept has been changed to automatically pick any plants within 50m over 2s (at max rank). This also applies to the Silver Grove Quest, which requires players to collect certain plant resources to progress. The objective descriptions have been updated to specify “gathering” instead of “scanning”. The scanning mechanic was overly complicated for new players, so this simplification should benefit Plant Extract gathering for Tenno across the board.

Ruk's Claws are Plants found only in Mars' Grineer Settlements, usually in damp areas shaded from the sun. Usage Checklist for Ruk's Claw Item Type Quantity Twilight Apothic Gear 6 Last updated: Hotfix 38.0.12 (2025-02-20) Farming Locations These are based on opinions and may not be 100% true. These should be viewed as advice for finding the resources until better facts are proven. Target Planet Name Type Level Tile Set Mars Ara Capture 10 - 12 Grineer Settlement Mars Hellas Exterminate 8 - 10 Grineer Settlement Gathering Tips Oxylus' Botanist will automatically loot plants within range. Trivia Ruk's Claw is named after General Sargas Ruk. Media Ruk's Claw in the Codex. 2 Ruk's Claw spawns. Commonly spawns on the Grineer Settlement tileset (Mars). This is what Ruk's Claw looks like in-game. Patch History Update 39.0 (2025-06-25) Players will no longer have to scan plants to earn their extracts. Now, plants like Moonlight Dragonlily and Ruk’s Claw will have a “Hold to Collect” context action to pick them up in-mission. Oxylus’ Botanist Precept has been changed to automatically pick any plants within 50m over 2s (at max rank). This also applies to the Silver Grove Quest, which requires players to collect certain plant resources to progress. The objective descriptions have been updated to specify “gathering” instead of “scanning”. The scanning mechanic was overly complicated for new players, so this simplification should benefit Plant Extract gathering for Tenno across the board.

sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Saturated Muscle Mass can be obtained by filleting Kymaeros and Ostimyr (both from the Cambion Drift ) at Daughter in the Necralisk .

• Saturated Muscle Mass can also be bought from Daughter from the "Daily Special" in exchange for Platinum . Note that the "Daily Special" wares are rotating, and Saturated Muscle Mass may not be available.

• Saturated Muscle Mass can also be found in Ralizor and Spytia Infested Cysts scattered around on the Cambion Drift.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 Scintillant can be obtained in the following ways:

 • Rare Reward from Tier 1 Bounties from Mother , and a common reward from Tier 2 Bounties.

• Drops from hostile Necramechs found during Isolation Vault Bounties.

• Found in Isolation Vaults as floating entities that can be picked up.
 • Scintillant entities have a chance to respawn.

sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 Acquired via the Maw Feeding activity in Duviri . The feeding platforms are usually located next to small ponds. You need to be in "The Duviri Experience", not "The Lone Story" or "The Circuit".

 ORIGIN Blinkpad Blinkpad Blinkpad Blinkpad Blinkpad Blinkpad Blinkpad Blinkpad Blinkpad Blinkpad Blinkpad Blinkpad Blinkpad Blinkpad Blinkpad Blinkpad Blinkpad The Caves of Academe Fragment N 4 Looking at the massive Archarbor building from the southwest path, you'll find this on the point of a curved rock on the right side of the path, near a materlith. The Caves of Academe Fragment N 9 This is near the southwest path and might be a bit difficult to see because of the foliage. The Caves of Academe Fragment N 5 On top of the roof covering the Dominus Thrax statue, in the southeast. The Caves of Academe Fragment N 2 Now this one actually is on the dome- on one of the golden decorations coming off the arch that rises from the dome. The Caves of Academe Fragment N 8 This sits on an island near the main one, to the east. The Caves of Academe Fragment N 6 This one's under the dome, not on top of it. It's on top of the arched gate. The Caves of Academe Fragment N 1 This fragment is on the ground, not the dome. It's behind a tree next to the shopkeeper, which is the orange marker on the map. The Caves of Academe Fragment N 3 To the north part of the island, near the G3 marker, you'll see a console you can interact with. Once you do so, the floor will open up behind it and you can enter the cave. The Caves of Academe Fragment N 7 Found in the north, near a tree by the edge of the island. sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 Seram Beetle Shells are acquired by cutting up Glappids caught through Fishing . Go to Fisher Hai-Luk in Cetus, select the desired amount of Glappids available, and select the " Cut Fish " option to extract the components. Each Glappid cut yields one Seram Beetle Shell. Tusk Thumper Domas also have a chance to drop Seram Beetle Shells upon defeat.

[ edit | edit source ]
 Sharrac Teeth are acquired by cutting up Sharrac caught through Fishing . Go to Fisher Hai-Luk in Cetus, select the desired amount of Sharrac available, and select the " Cut Fish " option to extract the components. Each Sharrac cut yields one Sharrac Teeth.

 Alternatively, Fisher Hai-Luk can sell Sharrac Teeth in bundles of 10 or 20 among her rotating stock of " Daily Specials ", which can be bought for Platinum .

sections.text: Fishing CODEX While rarely venturing from the deepest of waters of the plains, the Sharrac is a fearsome predator who will prey on unwary Ostrons swimming alone. Sharrac is a species of fish in the Plains of Eidolon. Biome: Ocean Activity: Cathemeral (Day and Night time) Twilight Bait needed. Effective Spears: Lanzo/Tulok Maximum Weight: 40 kg Rarity: Uncommon Small Medium Large 100 Standing 100 125 Standing 125 200 Standing 200 Fish Meat x2 Fish Scales x4 Fish Oil x2 Sharrac Teeth x1 Fish Meat x3 Fish Scales x6 Fish Oil x3 Sharrac Teeth x1 Fish Meat x4 Fish Scales x8 Fish Oil x4 Sharrac Teeth x1 Sharrac Trophy “A trophy of a prized catch.” —In-Game Description Sharrac Trophy is a Fishing Trophy Decoration that can be crafted and displayed in the player's Orbiter. The blueprint can be purchased from Fisher Hai-Luk for 7,500 Standing 7,500, requiring the rank of Trusted with the Ostron.  • Upon completion of The Duviri Paradox and Angels of the Zariman , and unlocking The Steel Path , players can earn Sibear Incarnon Genesis from The Circuit 's Steel Path to place on their Sibear with the help of Cavalero in the Chrysalith . This Incarnon Genesis form grants it evolutions to a transformation and newfound strength.

• Purchased from Cavalero for 120 Platinum 120 , complete with the resources used in its installation. This purchase can only be made once .

• Donating a Maxed or Gilded Predasites and Vulpaphyla companion.

• Trading random assortment of Cambion Drift resources under the Mend the Family option with Grandmother.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Sporulate Sacs can be obtained by filleting Glutinox (from the Cambion Drift ) at Daughter in the Necralisk . Each Glutinox will give 1 Sporulate Sac regardless of size.

• Sporulate Sacs can also be bought from Daughter from the "Daily Special" in exchange for Platinum . Note that the "Daily Special" wares are rotating, and Sporulate Sacs may not be there.

• Sporulate Sacs can also be randomly obtained from Requiem Obelisks

• Sporulate Sacs can be housed within common Rolizor Infested and rare Spitia Infested Cysts scattered around on the Cambion Drift.

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • The Melee Types potentially benefiting from a Stance Forma are the following:

 • Dagger

• Dual Daggers

• Dual Swords

• Fist

• Hammer

• Heavy Blade

• Polearm

• Scythe

• Sparring

• Staff

• Sword

• Tonfa

• Whip

 • The following other Melee Types do not benefit from this, as all available Stances have the same Polarity:

 • Assault Saw

• Blade and Whip

• Claws (Melee)

• Dual Nikanas

• Glaive (Weapon Type)

• Gunblade

• Heavy Scythe

• Machete (Weapon Type)

• Nikana (Weapon Type)

• Nunchaku

• Rapier

• Sword and Shield

• Two-Handed Nikana

• Warfan

 View Stance Mods List ▾ ▾

 Main article: Stance Mods
 Category for Stances .

 • Stance Forma cannot be used on Exalted Weapons .
 • Garuda Talons / Garuda Prime Talons are exception to this, however it receives no benefit due to being a Claw.

• The Dark Split-Sword can benefit greatly from a Stance Forma, as it can be used as either Dual Swords or a Heavy Blade, depending on the stance equipped. However, none of the stance polarities of one weapon type are compatible with the other.

• Dual Heat Swords is the only melee weapon to not come with a stance polarity.

• Grim Fury is the only stance mod with an incompatible polarity for all Sparring weapons currently available.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Stock is obtained from completing Break Narmer 's bonus challenges. Rewards are one-time per week, resetting on Monday 00:00 UTC; a total of 105 Stock is obtainable per week.

• Stock can spawn in Break Narmer missions as a pickup, appearing as a blue crate each awarding 2 Stock. 8 to 12 boxes can spawn in a mission, but only 5 can be picked up before the rest vanish, awarding 10 Stock per mission, and requires the player to complete the mission to claim them. Stock boxes will respawn on replays.

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • To purchase all non-rotating offerings from Chipper at least once, players need 980 Stock .
 • Purchasing all rotating offerings at least once will require 270 Stock , for a total of 1,250 Stock .

• As Break Narmer missions award 115 Stock for completing all their challenges and collecting 5 Stock pickups, players will need to complete roughly 9 Break Narmer missions (replays to farm Stock pickups notwithstanding) to purchase all non-rotating offerings at least once.

sections.title: Article body
sections.text: For the nighttime form, see Moonlight Dragonlily. CODEX This uncommon plant can only be found during the day. Sunlight Dragonlilies are Plants found only in Earth's Grineer Forests during the daytime, often growing on the surface near grassy areas or bodies of water. Usage Checklist for Sunlight Dragonlily Item Type Quantity Citrine Antitoxin Gear 2 Lapis Antitoxin Gear 1 Vermillion Antitoxin Gear 4 Last updated: Hotfix 38.0.12 (2025-02-20) Farming Locations These are based on opinions and may not be 100% true. These should be viewed as advice for finding the resources until better facts are proven. Note that the Sunlight Dragonlily can only spawn when it is daytime on the Grineer Forest tileset. Target Planet Name Type Level Tile Set Earth Mantle Capture 2 - 4 Grineer Forest Earth E Prime Exterminate 1 - 3 Grineer Forest Earth Cervantes Sabotage 4 - 6 Grineer Forest Gathering Tips Oxylus' Botanist will automatically loot plants within range. There's always two Sunlight Dragonfly (during day time) spawning at the same location in Lith, Earth. They can be easily found after entering the open area of the map during the start of the mission and going left hugging the border of the map. One is inside a cave, and the second one is a little further from the first one's location on the map border. Trivia The Dragonlily's name is derived from one of the Dracunculus vulgaris' nicknames. While its appearance are based off unbosomed Liliums, a genus of herbaceous flowering plants growing from bulbs that are considered true lilies. Media Sunlight Dragonlily in the Codex. Patch History Update 39.0 (2025-06-25) Players will no longer have to scan plants to earn their extracts. Now, plants like Moonlight Dragonlily and Ruk’s Claw will have a “Hold to Collect” context action to pick them up in-mission. Oxylus’ Botanist Precept has been changed to automatically pick any plants within 50m over 2s (at max rank). This also applies to the Silver Grove Quest, which requires players to collect certain plant resources to progress. The objective descriptions have been updated to specify “gathering” instead of “scanning”. The scanning mechanic was overly complicated for new players, so this simplification should benefit Plant Extract gathering for Tenno across the board. Update: The Silver Grove (2016-08-19) Icons in Foundry changed to represent respective plants instead of vials with colored liquids. Update 11.5 (2013-12-19) Introduced via The Cicero Crisis.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Upon completion of The Duviri Paradox and Angels of the Zariman , and unlocking The Steel Path , players can earn Sybaris Incarnon Genesis from The Circuit 's Steel Path to place on their Sybaris with the help of Cavalero in the Chrysalith . This Incarnon Genesis form grants it evolutions to a transformation and newfound strength.

• Purchased from Cavalero for 120 Platinum 120 , complete with the resources used in its installation. This purchase can only be made once .

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • In Incarnon form, the Dex and Prime variants have very similar stats and, after commonly used Evolutions, primarily differ as follows:
 • Dex Sybaris with Elemental Dominance : 111 Damage, 50% Status Chance, better recoil

• Sybaris Prime with Survivor's Edge : 125 Damage, 40% Status Chance, better accuracy

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Eidolon Shards can be converted to Focus in the Orbiter 's Transference Room . To do so, players can go to Focus Conversion to the lower right corner of the screen when viewing an unlocked school's ability tree, then selecting how many Shards they want to redeem.
 • The Focus points provided by converting these does not affect the daily cap, allowing players to continue gaining Focus beyond the daily cap.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Mining yellow mineral veins in Cambion Drift . It is commonly found in Infested Seraglio cave system.

• Requiem Obelisks have a chance to drop Thaumica when the kill condition of the Obelisk is satisfied (usually killing with the operator or Necramech ).

• Spitia Infested Cysts (rare) occasionally found on the Cambion Drift (seemingly one placed at Albrecht's Prospect region)

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • They can be traded at Otak in exchange for Otak Tokens in quantities of 4 to 30.

 • Mining teal gem veins in the Cambion Drift.

• Collect Storage containers found in the Bonus vaults found during Isolation Vault bounties .

• Destroy Sagiant Entrati Caskets scattered around on the Cambion Drift.

sections.title: Article body
sections.text: I want more... Operator, please hurry! This story is getting quite good!This article is a stub. You can help WARFRAME Wiki by adding a sentence or two. Please do not use this article for critical in-game information!This article is archived. The content was relevant to an obsolete version of Warframe, and has since been removed, retrieved, and/or revamped. Time is relative. Choose when ready.This article refers to valid content that is currently unavailable to be acquired in the live version of the game.It may return to be available again in a future update or event. “An organ found on Infested Ships believed to facilitate communication within the Infested Hivemind.” —In-Game Description Trachons were an uncommon resource that could be found in any Empyrean mission. They were used in upgrading the Railjack. Blueprints Requiring Trachons Click to view the Blueprints requiring Trachons Blueprint Type Quantity(Research) Squad Health Restore (Large) x100 Gear (300) Zetki Apoc Mk III Ship Turret 1,800 Zetki Carcinnox Mk III Ship Turret 1,800 Zetki Cryophon Mk III Ship Turret 1,800 Zetki Engines Mk III Ship Component 1,800 Zetki Photor Mk III Ship Turret 1,800 Zetki Pulsar Mk III Ship Turret 1,800 Zetki Reactor Mk III Ship Component 1,800 Zetki Shield Array Mk III Ship Component 1,800 Total 14,400 (+300) Research x1 x3 x10 x30 x100 Last updated: Hotfix 29.9.1 (2021-02-24) Gathering Tips Despite being an Uncommon resource, Trachons tend to drop much less frequently on Earth and Saturn Proxima mission nodes than they do on Veil Proxima ones. Exo Ramsleds in Veil Proxima drop 10-25 Trachons upon their destruction. A MK III Tycho seeker can easily destroy them, but it must be thrown quickly before they come too close for the missile to catch up. Patch History Update 29.10 (2021-03-19) Removed from drop tables. We wanted to reduce the number of Resources we introduced in our original Railjack launch. They'll remain in your Inventory as we’ll be looking at possibly reintroducing them at a later date. All Blueprints that required these items have been updated to reflect viable Resources, and respective drops have been swapped to Ticor Plate where appropriate. These Resources have also been removed from Helminths Bile Feeding menu. If you spot any mentions of these Resources that we might have missed please let us know! For Tenno who have partially contributed these Resources to Wreckage, the percentage of your contribution will be honoured for the Resource that replaces it. Ex: If you contributed 60% of the needed Copernics for a Carcinnox, that 60% contribution will be carried over when the Blueprints are updated. Update 27.0 (2019-12-13) Introduced.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 Tralok Eyes are acquired by cutting up Tralok caught through Fishing . Go to Fisher Hai-Luk in Cetus, select the desired amount of Tralok available, and select the " Cut Bait " option to extract the components. Each Tralok cut yields one Tralok Eyes.

 Alternatively, Fisher Hai-Luk can sell Tralok Eyes in bundles of 20 among her rotating stock of " Daily Specials ", which can be bought for Platinum .

 Tusk Thumper can also drop them.

sections.title: Article body
sections.text: Fishing CODEX Strong, predatory fish with eyes that can pierce the darkest shadows. Tralok is a species of fish in the Plains of Eidolon. Biome: Ocean Activity: Diurnal (Day time) Effective Spears: Tulok, Spari Maximum Weight: 40 kg Rarity: Uncommon Small Medium Large 100 Standing 100 125 Standing 125 200 Standing 200 Fish Meat x2 Fish Scales x5 Fish Oil x1 Tralok Eyes x1 Fish Meat x3 Fish Scales x7 Fish Oil x2 Tralok Eyes x1 Fish Meat x4 Fish Scales x9 Fish Oil x3 Tralok Eyes x1 Tralok Trophy “A trophy of a prized catch.” —In-Game Description Tralok Trophy is a Fishing Trophy Decoration that can be crafted and displayed in the player's Orbiter. The blueprint can be purchased from Fisher Hai-Luk for 5,000 Standing 5,000, requiring the rank of Visitor with the Ostron. Manufacturing Requirements 5,000 1 25 25 1,200 Time: 1 hrs Rush: 10 Platinum 10 Market Price: N/A Blueprints Price: 5,000

 Trembera can be gained on either Earth , Mercury , Ceres , or Saturn by breaking open containers and killing enemies.

 A total of 75 Trembera Essence are required to craft the needed amount of 5 Relay Strut Component s.

sections.title: Blueprint
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Purchased from The Steel Path Honors Shop for 150 Steel Essence when available once every 8 weeks. Check availability on the The Steel Path page.

• Next Umbra Forma will be available for purchase from July 20th to July 26th.

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Umbra Forma cannot be applied to Archwings , Archguns , Archmelee , K-Drives , Necramechs , Companions or non-melee weapons, since there are no Umbra Mods available for them, and hence they cannot benefit from a reduced polarity drain.
 • Vinquibus (Primary) can apply Umbra Forma through Vinquibus (Melee) , but due to the above reason, it also cannot benefit from reduced polarity drains as any applied Forma is shared between two forms.

• Umbra Forma cannot be used to polarize a Warframe 's Exilus or aura slot.

• The Helios / Helios Prime weapons ( Deconstructor and Deconstructor Prime ) are the only Companion Weapons able to utilize Umbra Mods. Umbra Mods are unavailable for Hound weapons and hence Umbra Forma cannot apply to them.

• Umbra Forma can only apply Umbra polarity, and cannot be used to apply other polarities.

• The Helios / Helios Prime weapons ( Deconstructor and Deconstructor Prime ) are the only Companion Weapons able to utilize Umbra Mods. Umbra Mods are unavailable for Hound weapons and hence Umbra Forma cannot apply to them.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 Vainthorns are an award from the Abyssal Zone on Ceres . Access to the Abyssal Zone requires Abyssal Beacons , which can be purchased from any of the six main Syndicates ( Steel Meridian , Arbiters of Hexis , Cephalon Suda , The Perrin Sequence , Red Veil , or New Loka ) at Rank 2 for 5000 Standing 5000 .

 Upon mission completion, one Abyssal Beacon is consumed from the player who started the mission vote.

 Vainthorns are awarded upon mission completion: 6, 7, or 8 are gained normally, with 8, 11, or 12 gained in The Steel Path . These amounts are not affected by Resource Boosters or the retrieval of multiple Defixio .

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Upon completion of The Duviri Paradox and Angels of the Zariman , and unlocking The Steel Path , players can earn Vasto Incarnon Genesis from The Circuit 's Steel Path to place on their Vasto with the help of Cavalero in the Chrysalith . This Incarnon Genesis form grants it evolutions to a transformation and newfound strength.

• Purchased from Cavalero for 120 Platinum 120 , complete with the resources used in its installation. This purchase can only be made once .

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Dropped by Demolisher Bonewidow , and Demolisher Voidrig that appear after activating a Conduit in Disruption; specifically in Armatus , Deimos .
 • Normal: 2-4 Vessel Capillaries

• The Steel Path : 5-7 Vessel Capillaries

• Drops are not affected by Resource Boosters or Resourceful Retriever .

sections.title: Usage
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 This section is transcluded from Loid (Original) § Research Dante . To change it, please edit the transcluded page .
 Vessel Capillaries can be used to purchase Dante , Onos , and Ruvox blueprints and components as an alternative to Armatus drops. Respectively, they are 540, 360, and 360 capillaries to purchase outright. Also available for purchase are Riven Transmuters , the Dante's Retreat and The Abandoned Vessel Captura scenes, and access to the Sanctum Simulacrum . In total, 1260 vessel capillaries are needed to purchase all mastery-related items, another 540 to purchase a second Dante for Helminth purposes, and then another 275 to purchase the bonus items.

sections.title: Article body
sections.text: Fishing CODEX Whatever higher functions this fish once had have been consumed, leaving it a mere automaton of metal and flesh. It ekes out a primitive existence in cave systems. Vitreospina is an Infested-Orokin hybrid fish in the Cambion Drift. Biome: Cave Activity: Fass/Vome Fass Residue recommended. Maximum Points: 8 Rarity: Uncommon Basic Adorned Magnificent Benign Infested Tumor x3 Spinal Core Section x1 Dendrite Blastoma x1 Tubercular Gill System x2 Ferment Bladder x2 Benign Infested Tumor x4 Spinal Core Section x1 Dendrite Blastoma x1 Tubercular Gill System x3 Ferment Bladder x3 Benign Infested Tumor x6 Spinal Core Section x1 Dendrite Blastoma x1 Tubercular Gill System x4 Ferment Bladder x4 Trivia Chondricord, Vitreospina and Barbisteo respectively appear to be the pure, hybrid and fully infested version of the same creature. Barbisteo however, does not give the player a Spinal Core Section. Vitreospina Trophy “A trophy of a prized catch.” —In-Game Description Vitreospina Trophy is a Fishing Trophy Decoration that can be crafted and displayed in the player's Orbiter. The blueprint can be purchased from Daughter for 3,000 Standing 3,000, requiring the rank of Acquaintance with the Entrati. Manufacturing Requirements 5,000 1 25 30 1,100 Time: 1 hrs Rush: 10 Platinum 10 Market Price: N/A Blueprints Price: 3,000 Gallery Patch History Update 29.0 (2020-08-25) Introduced. Last updated: Update 29.0 (2020-08-25)

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Void Traces are primarily obtained by collecting Reactant in Void Fissure missions, which drops from Corrupted enemies, awarding 6-30 Void Traces upon collection of the 10th Reactant. Players are not required to have a Void Relic equipped to obtain Traces.

• When selecting opened Void Relic rewards, the player owning an opened relic gains 5 bonus Void Traces per teammate (excluding self) who picks the reward that came from their own relic. Thus, up to a total of 15 bonus Traces are obtained if the rest of the team picks their reward.

• Granum Void Rank 1 reward contains 5 / 10 / 15 Void Traces for Normal/Extended/Nightmare Tiers.

• Isolation Vaults contain storage containers that, when broken, may drop Void Traces.

 Unlike most resources, there is an upper limit to how many Void Traces a player can stockpile. This cap is determined by one's Mastery Rank using the formula: (Mastery Rank × 50) + 100 . For example, a player at Mastery Rank 13 can hold up to 750 Void Traces, while at Mastery Rank 30 one can hold up to 1600. Increasing one's Mastery Rank will immediately increase Void Trace storage capacity. Excess Void Traces are discarded, except that excess Void Traces reclaimed upon defeating a Kuva Lich are retained.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 Volatile Motes can be obtained by:

 • Completing the operation variant of Brutus , Uranus during the event; where each completion of the mission will reward 4-6 Volatile Motes (8-10 on Steel Path ).

• Defeating a Sister of Parvos within Brutus, Uranus; which rewards 1-3 Volatile Motes per kill (2-4 on Steel Path ).

• Completing timed Operation Alerts that appears across the Origin System, which rewards players with 10 Volatile Motes each (15 on Steel Path).

sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 This section is transcluded from Operation: Belly of the Beast § Rewards . To change it, please edit the transcluded page .
 During the event, Ordis can be found in the Larunda Relay on Mercury in the Navigation Room, where he will trade rewards for Volatile Motes, before disposing of the Motes in the sun to keep them out of Granum's hands. Players can manually travel to Ordis from the Landing Craft docks, or Fast Travel to him directly. Along with his standard store for purchasing Jade 's components, weapon blueprints and Ascension Arcane Enhancements in exchange for Vestigial Motes , Ordis has two separate event reward stores, one for all players and one for players who are part of a Clan :

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 After Fass kills Vome to begin the Fass cycle on the Cambion Drift , small zones of blue energy will appear in various locations. Entering a zone will cover the edges of the screen in blue sludge and grant a temporary %? movement speed bonus to all Infested and Necramechs (both player-controlled and AI-controlled) within the zone, as well as a speed penalty to all Tenno (including Warframes, Operators, and Archwings, though K-Drives are exempt). Multiple deposits of Vome Residue will spawn inside each zone and can be destroyed to acquire 1 Vome Residue each.

 Note that if one stays in the Cambion Drift for long enough, there may be Vome Residue on the map even though Vome is active.

sections.title: Drop Locations
sections.text: [ edit | edit source ]

sections.title: Notes
sections.text:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Amount yielded is not affected by Resource Booster s or Charm .

• Resource deposits are not marked (e.g. Thief's Wit ).

• 6-12 Wyrm Residue, depending on squad size, (either Fass Residue or Vome Residue ) are needed to activate the bait machine in the first stage of the Isolation Vault bounty. Existing Residue will despawn, and new Residue will respawn for the players to collect.

• They can be traded at Father in exchange for Father Token s in quantities of 6 to 11. Curiously, Father will never ask for Residue in Token bundles that reward two or fewer tokens.
